name: A Place For Us
official_description: While healing an another Survivor, both you and the healed Survivor gain Elusive Status Effect. When you finish healing the Obsession, both you and the Obsession gain Elusive Status Effect for 20 / 25 / 30 seconds. Reduces your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by reducing the default value by -100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time. "I understand computers… systems. Problems. But this… I wonder if I’ll ever understand." — Kwon Tae-young
description_ar: بيرك A Place For Us يعطي اللاعب أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Kwon Tae-young. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك A Place For Us يعطي اللاعب أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Kwon Tae-young. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: now also applies Elusive to the perk holder when finishing a heal on the Obsession.

official_description: THIS PERK IS UNUSED ( This Unlockable is not used in the current Game, but exists in the Game Code. ) THIS PERK WAS UNUSED AND UNOBTAINABLE BY PLAYERS. THE EFFECTS OF THIS PERK ARE UNKNOWN.

name: Bada Bada Boom
official_description: "You may not be a fighter, but you have clever ways of striking back." After completing 20 % worth of Generator repairs, Bada Bada Boom activates: While active, press Active Ability button next to a window to install a Trap, which stays active for up to 40 / 50 / 60 seconds. The Trap tiggers when the Killer performs a vault through the window, causing the Killer to suffer from a -50 % Hindered Status Effect for 6 seconds. Bada Bada Boom deactives after triggering successfully or once the timer runs out. The Auras of Trapped Windows are revealed to all Survivors in yellow. "Never tell me the odds." — Dustin Henderson
description_ar: بيرك Bada Bada Boom يعطي اللاعب أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Dustin Henderson. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Better than New
official_description: "You are an expert in combat medicine. Patients leave your care reinvigorated." Completing a Healing action on another Survivor grants them the following benefits until they receive damage again: Increases their Action speeds for Blessing, Cleansing, Healing, and Unlocking by 12 / 14 / 16 %. |
description_ar: بيرك Better than New يعطي اللاعب أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Rebecca Chambers. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased and modified the Action Speed bonus from a fixed +6 % to a variable 12 / 14 / 16 %.
Buff: removed the timer, now applies its effects until the Survivor takes damage again.
Buff: now also affects the Blessing speed.
Nerf: no longer affects the Repair speed.

name: Change of Plan
official_description: "Rather than give in to danger, you recalculate and adjust your strategy." You start the Trial with 2 Tokens. While hiding inside a Locker and holding a non-event Toolbox, press Active Ability button to spend 1 Token and transform your Error into a Med-Kit of the same rarity with a random add-on of the same rarity. The new Med-kit has 80 / 90 / 100 seconds of its charges. "Oh my god, oh my god, oh my god, oh my god." — Dustin Henderson

name: Cross-Examination
official_description: While inside the Killer's Terror Radius, the Killer leaves behind Light Marks that you can see. Light Marks have a duration of 10 seconds While standing on a Light Mark, gain Elusive Status Effect. This lingers for 3 / 4 / 5 seconds. | "The witness has said enough, Your Honor. No further questions." — Shane Wiigwaas

name: Extrasensory Perception
official_description: "By slowing down and focusing, you can sense both ally and enemy." Crouch for 4 seconds to activate this perk. While active: You see the Auras of Survivors, the Killer, and a variety of objects. These are revealed in an expanding 44 meter radius.. | Revealed objects include Chests, Exit Gate, Generators, Hatch, Items, Pallets, Totems, and Windows. | You gain Elusive and Oblivious Status Effects | When you stop crouching, or after 11 seconds, all effects of this perk end and it enters a 60 / 50 / 40 seconds cooldown. "What is friend?" — Eleven

name: Five Moves Ahead
official_description: This perk activates while you are being chased by the Killer or are inside the Killer's Terror Radius: After you drop a Pallet, you start moving 50 % earlier. | See the auras of the 5 closest Pallets and Windows. | This perk goes on a 40 / 35 / 30 seconds cool-down when you drop a Pallet. "Every problem has a solution. It’s only a question of complexity." — Kwon Tae-young

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.5.0 [ edit ] Nerf: increased cool-down from 30 / 25 / 20 seconds to 40 / 35 / 30 seconds.

name: Flow State
official_description: Whenever a Generator is completed, gain a token, up to 5. For each token: Bless and cleanse Totems 8 / 9 / 10 % faster. | Heal 8 / 9 / 10 % faster. | Unhook Survivors 8 / 9 / 10 % faster. | "I’m sorry… I didn’t realize I was working so late." — Kwon Tae-young

name: Hex: Scared to Death
official_description: When you Hook 3 different Survivors, Hex: Scared to Death activates on a random Totem and triggers its effect: Basic-breaking a Pallet during a chase causes all Survivors within 13 metres to scream and gain 11 / 12 / 13 % Hindered Status Effect for 3 seconds. | The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "There was a scream from the forest. Like someone was attacking her." — Mount Ormond Missing Person Report

name: Hyperfocus
official_description: "You throw yourself entirely into your tasks and find ways to be more efficient than anyone else." Succeeding a Great Skill Check while repairing or healing grants +1 Token, up to a maximum of 6 Tokens: Increases the Skill Check Trigger odds and Pointer-Rotation speed by +4 % per Token each, up to a maximum of +24 %. | Increases the Skill Check Bonus progression by 10 / 20 / 30 % of its base value per Token, up to a maximum of 60 / 120 / 180 %. | Hyperfocus loses all Tokens after succeeding just a Good Skill Check, failing one, or if the action is interrupted by any means.

This Perk would have adjusted the default range of the Terror Radius based on how many Survivors were still alive in the Trial.

name: Last Standing
official_description: THIS PERK IS UNUSED ( This Unlockable is not used in the current Game, but exists in the Game Code. ) THIS PERK WAS UNUSED AND UNOBTAINABLE BY PLAYERS. For each Survivor that had already left the Trial by any means, Last Standing would grow in power: Grants a stack-able 7.5 / 15 / 25 % bonus to all Action speeds, up to a maximum of 22.5 / 45 / 75 %. |

name: Low Profile
official_description: "You work best alone. When it is just you and your pursuer, you know how to disappear." Whenever you are the only Survivor in the Trial not currently incapacitated by either being downed, carried, or hooked, Low Profile activates: Suppresses your Grunts of Pain and the creation of Pools of Blood and Scratch Marks for 70 / 80 / 90 seconds. | Low Profile deactivates after use and only accounts for Survivors still participating in the Trial.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: changed the Activation condition from being the Last Survivor Standing to just being the only Survivor left not currently incapacitated by any means (not to be confused with the Status Effect of the same name). This allows for multiple activations during the Trial, instead of just once, which was deemed too restrictive after playtests on the PTB.

"Signs of a pursuit led deep into the woods where the victim's body was found." — Port Henly Herald

official_description: "The more the situation becomes compromised, the more determined you become to complete the operation." Whenever another Survivor within 32 metres of your location loses a Health State by any means while you are in the Injured State, you benefit from the following effect: Grants 40 / 45 / 50 % of your missing Healing Progression towards your Health Bar. |

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 7.1.1 [ edit ] Quality of Life: allows the Perk to fully heal a Survivor purely through repeated activations, causing the percentage to round up if there is only a tiny bit of progression missing. While the Patch Notes use 96.4 % (equivalent to 5 activations) as an example of it rounding up, in-game testing ( Patch 7.6.0 ) showed that rounding up did not occur until 99.6 % (equivalent to 8 activations).

name: Reassurance
official_description: "Your presence helps allies focus, assuaging the panic associated with extreme conditions." While within 6 metres of a hooked Survivor, press the Active Ability button to trigger the following effects for 20 / 25 / 30 seconds: Pauses the Sacrifice Process. This also pauses the Struggle Skill Checks for Survivors in the Struggle Phase. | | Causes the outline of that Survivor to be highlighted in white. | Reassurance can only be used once per Survivor per Hook Instance.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.2.0 [ edit ] Rework: slightly reworked the Perk from its PTB-version for the live release. The changes below intended to prevent future cases of abuse and griefing from the PTB-version.
Buff: removed the cool-down.
Nerf: added a use-limit of once per Survivor per Hook Instance.

Whenever a Totem is blessed or cleansed, a random unblocked generator becomes blocked for 20 / 25 / 30 seconds. name: Teamwork: Full Circuit
official_description: "You've dabbled with mechanical engineering and show off your abilities to others." For each Survivor repairing a generator with you, the size of the good Skill Check zone is increased by 15 / 20 / 25 %. While repairing with at least 1 other Survivor, you repair 5 % faster. "How many times do I have to be right on the money before you guys just trust me?" — Dustin Henderson

name: Turn Back the Clock
official_description: "Resist as they might, time marches on, and your master plan comes closer to fruition." After hooking a Survivor, for 40 / 50 / 60 seconds, press the Active Ability button to make a target generator within 20 meters explode, lose -10 % progress, and start regressing. "Nothing will happen to you... Nothing that you don't deserve!" — Henry Creel
description_ar: بيرك Turn Back the Clock يعطي اللاعب أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The First. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Turn Back the Clock يعطي اللاعب أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The First. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.

name: Underperform
official_description: THIS PERK IS UNUSED ( This Unlockable is not used in the current Game, but exists in the Game Code. ) THIS PERK WAS UNUSED AND UNOBTAINABLE BY PLAYERS. THE EFFECTS OF THIS PERK ARE UNKNOWN.

name: We See You
official_description: "You've honed your powers and can turn the tables on those who try to find you." Gain 1 token when the Killer reveals your Aura. When you have 4 tokens, they are all consumed, and the Killer 's aura is revealed to you and all other Survivors for 10 / 12.5 / 15 seconds. This perk has a 10-second cooldown for gaining tokens. "It is not me. It is you. You are the monster." — Eleven

name: Wide Open Throttle
official_description: Fast-vaulting a Pallet triggers the following effects: Gain 10 / 12.5 / 15 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds. | The Pallet is immediately reset and blocked by the Entity for 60 seconds. | This perk then goes on a 60 second cool-down. "Nothing but the open road. Just the way I like it." — Shane Wiigwaas

name: Wiretap
official_description: "You know that the best way to stay one step ahead is to keep tabs on the competition." After repairing a Generator for the equivalent of 40 % of Progression, Wiretap activates. While active, press the Active Ability button while standing next to a Generator to install a listening device to it with a countdown of 100 / 110 / 120 seconds: Reveals the Aura of the Killer coming within 14 metres of the Bugged Generator to all Survivors. | The listening device is deactivated after its countdown has elapsed or the Bugged Generator is damaged. The Auras of Bugged Generators are revealed to all Survivors in yellow.
description_ar: بيرك Wiretap يعطي اللاعب أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Ada Wong. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Activation duration from 60 / 70 / 80 seconds to 100 / 110 / 120 seconds.
Nerf: increased the Activation requirement from 33 % to 50 %.
Patch 7.2.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: the Button prompt to install the Trap is now available while standing near a Generator, once the Perk is active.
Patch 8.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Activation requirement from 50 % to 40 %.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: A Nurse's Calling
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of injured Survivors being healed or healing themselves are revealed to you within 28 / 30 / 32 metres. | "Still attached to the fragments of her past life, she is drawn to those in need of help."

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.1.2 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced Aura-reading ranges to 20 / 24 / 28 metres.
Patch 2.4.0 [ edit ] Nerf: no longer reveals Survivors that are Snapping Out of It.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased Aura-reading ranges to 28 / 30 / 32 metres.
Nerf: no longer reveals Survivors that are in the Dying state.
Old Flavour Text [ edit ] "Does she still bear some empathy inside her? Or can she smell blood?" <span class="mw-headline"

name: Agitation
official_description: "You get excited in anticipation of hooking your prey." While carrying a Survivor, Agitation activates: Increases your Carrying speed by 6 / 12 / 18 %. | Increases your Terror Radius by +12 metres. | "At some point, the excitement of hooking one of us becomes more important than the desire to kill us."

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the ranges of the secondary effect from 0 / 3 / 6 metres to 6 / 8 / 12 metres.
Patch 2.6.2 [ edit ] Buff: increased the ranges of the secondary effect and modified them from a variable 6 / 8 / 12 metres to a fixed +12 metres across all Tiers.
Patch 8.7.0 [ edit ] Undocumented Change: now applies a visible Haste Status Effect when active.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Alien Instinct
official_description: "You are so stealthy, sometimes it seems like you appear out of nowhere." Whenever you hook a Survivor, Alien Instinct activates: The Aura of the farthest Survivor from your current location who is in the Injured State is revealed to you for 8 seconds. | Causes that Survivor to suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for 40 / 50 / 60 seconds. | "Yellow light's for my eyes only." — Dallas

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Aura-reveal duration from 5 seconds to 8 seconds.
Buff: increased the duration of the Oblivious Status Effect from 16 / 18 / 20 seconds from 20 / 40 / 60 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: All-Shaking Thunder
official_description: "Enemies on land and sea learned to tremble before your might." After falling from a height, All-Shaking Thunder activates for 15 / 20 / 25 seconds: Increases the range of your Lunge Attack by +75 %. | All-Shaking Thunder has a cool-down of 5 seconds. "Go on. Run. Tell your friends I'm coming for them." — Portia Maye

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Effect duration from 8 / 12 / 16 seconds to 15 / 20 / 25 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Awakened Awareness
official_description: "Your genes have been altered to heighten your senses in intense situations." While carrying a Survivor, you benefit from the following effect: The Auras of other Survivors within 16 / 18 / 20 metres of your location are revealed to you. |

name: Bamboozle
official_description: You benefit from the following permanent effect: Increases your Vaulting speed by 5 / 10 / 15 %. | Whenever you vault a Window, Bamboozle calls upon The Entity for the following effect: Blocks it to all Survivors for 8 / 12 / 16 seconds. Vaulting it again within that time resets the timer. | Vaulting a different one transfers the effect to it instead. | | Bamboozle does not extend its effects to vaulting a dropped Pallet.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.5.0 [ edit ] Change: updated the in-game description to clarify that Bamboozle does not extend its effect to the act of vaulting Pallets to account for newer Killers with a Power that grants them that ability.
Patch 9.5.1 [ edit ] Undocumented Quality of Life: perk icon now displays the duration of the Window block.
Calculations [ edit ] Default Vaulting Time Bamboozle I Bamboozle II Bamboozle III 1.7 seconds 1.6 seconds 1.53 seconds 1.44 seconds <span class="mw-headline"

name: Barbecue & Chilli
official_description: A deep bond with The Entity unlocks potential in one's Aura-reading ability. After hooking a Survivor, all Survivors who are at least 60 / 50 / 40 metres away from that Hook have their Aura revealed to you for 5 seconds. | "I just can't take no pleasure in killing. There's just some things you gotta do. Don't mean you have to like it." — Drayton Sawyer
description_ar: بيرك Barbecue & Chilli يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Cannibal. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Barbecue & Chilli يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Cannibal. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.7.2 [ edit ] Quality of Life: adjusted the bonus Score Event when hooking a Survivor to only trigger if there is a Survivor already on the Hook.
Buff: changed Barbecue & Chilli to give the bonus Bloodpoints post-trial rather than during, similar to the functionality of We're Gonna Live Forever at the time.

Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Rework: each Tier now increases the maximum obtainable bonus Percentage to 50 / 75 / 100 %. Buff: changed the distance Survivors must be from the Hook from a variable 52 / 46 / 40 metres to a fixed 40 metres.
Buff: changed the stack-able bonus Percentage from a variable 15 / 20 / 25 % to a fixed +25 %.

Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: removed the bonus Bloodpoints due to reducing the grind in the Dead by Daylight's Progression System by ~75 %. Nerf: changed the distance Survivors must be from the Hook from a fixed 40 metres to a variable 60 / 50 / 40 metres.

Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] QoL (undocumented): increased the Aura-reveal duration from 4 seconds to 5 seconds. This change was most likely motivated by general changes to the Hooking interaction in the same Patch, which moved the Survivor's scream from triggering after the Hook pierces them to just before they are put onto the Hook itself, about a second earlier.

Since this also moved the activation trigger for Barbecue & Chilli to be about a second earlier, the Aura-reveal duration was increased by that second to compensate for the Killer still being stuck in the Hooking animation when the Aura-reveal begins, unable to move their camera around and make use of the Aura-reveal effect.
This change is deemed a Quality of Life change because of that, as the resulting usable Aura-reveal duration of the Perk remains effectively the same.

name: Batteries Included
official_description: "Being somewhere between man and machine has its upsides." While within 16 metres of a completed Generator, you benefit from the following effect: Grants a +5 % Haste Status Effect. This effect lingers for 1 / 3 / 5 second(s). | | "Surprise! Did you miss me, Andy?" — Chucky

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 7.4.0 [ edit ] Nerf: added a stipulation to the release version that disables the Perk once the Exit Gates are powered.

Patch 7.4.2 [ edit ] Reversal: removed the previously added stipulation, reverting the Perk back to its PTB-version. This change was prompted by massive complaints from the community over the added endgame restriction in the live release.
Patch 8.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Haste strength from +5 % to +7 %.
Patch 9.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the range of effect from 12 metres to 16 metres.
Reversal: reverted the Haste strength from +7 % back to +5 %.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: the primary effect now lasts for as long as Bloodlust is active.
Buff: removed the Activation cool-down.
Change: now awards bonus Bloodpoints in the Hunter Scoring Category during the Trial.
Patch 3.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: updated the Perk with the Undetectable Status Effect, adding its added effects of suppressing the Terror Radius and granting Aura-reading immunity.
Patch 8.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: Undetectable is no longer immediately lost after losing Bloodlust.
Nerf: Undetectable now lasts for a limited time after gaining Bloodlust, instead of for as long as Bloodlust is active.
Change: removed the secondary effect that granted bonus Bloodpoints during the Trial.
<span class="mw-headline"

Nerf: reduced the duration from a fixed 45 seconds to a variable 20 / 25 / 30 seconds. This change compensates for the removal of the cool-down.

name: Blood Warden

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.0.5 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Breaking Speed bonus from 10 / 20 / 30 % to 20 / 30 / 40 %.
Patch 1.7.0 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Breaking Speed bonus from 20 / 30 / 40 % to 10 / 15 / 20 %. This nerf compensated for a base-kit increase towards the Breaking speed.
Patch 2.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: now also affects damaging Generators.
Patch 3.6.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: updated the description for the newly introduced Breakable Walls.

Calculations [ edit ] Applicable as of Patch 6.1.0 Pallets and Breakable Walls [ edit ] Default Breaking Time 2.34 seconds Brutal Strength I 2.1 seconds Brutal Strength II 1.98 seconds Brutal Strength III 1.87 seconds Generators [ edit ] Default Damaging Time 1.8 seconds Brutal Strength I 1.62 seconds Brutal Strength II 1.53 seconds Brutal Strength III 1.44 seconds <span class="mw-headline"

<span class="mw-headline"

name: Coulrophobia
official_description: "Even those without a fear of clowns know to be terrified of you." Survivors inside your Terror Radius suffer from the following effects: Reduces all Healing speeds by 30 / 40 / 50 %. | Increases the Pointer-Rotation speed of Healing Skill Checks by +50 %. |
description_ar: بيرك Coulrophobia يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Clown. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Coulrophobia يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Clown. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 3.4.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: no longer shows its icon in the Survivors' HUD until its effect is actually applied. This change prevents Coulrophobia from acting as a visual warning whenever a Survivor enters the Terror Radius.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: added a new secondary effect that increases the Pointer-Rotation speed of Healing Skill Checks.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Coup de Grâce
official_description: As the end nears, you go in for the kill. Whenever a Generator is completed, Coup de Grâce gains +2 Tokens, up to a maximum of 10 Tokens per Trial: Increases the range of your next Lunge Attack by 70 / 75 / 80 %, while consuming -1 Token. | Coup de Grâce can only hold a maximum of 5 Tokens at a time.

Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: now grants 2 Tokens whenever a Generator is completed.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Cruel Limits
official_description: "Your ties to the otherworldly manifest when your prey attempts to get away." Whenever a Generator is completed, Cruel Limits triggers its effect for 20 / 25 / 30 seconds: Blocks all Windows for all Survivors. | The Auras of the Blocked Windows are revealed to you and highlighted in yellow. | "The specimen seems to be able to affect the state of nearby objects, as if they existed in some other form within a dimension alternate to our own." — Hawkins National Laboratory
description_ar: بيرك Cruel Limits يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Demogorgon. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: Increased the Effect range from 24 metres to 32 metres.

Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Retired: With the departure of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things from Dead by Daylight, Cruel Limits was reworked into a General Killer Perk: Claustrophobia. Rewrote the Lore text in the beginning of the description to be more generic.

For Players who had owned CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things before its removal, Claustrophobia would still show the original flavour text in the description and the Character association with The Demogorgon.
Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: Removed the range limit, allowing it to block all Windows across the entire Map.
Patch 7.3.3 [ edit ] Reinstation: Reinstated Cruel Limits with the return of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things. Renamed Claustrophobia back to Cruel Limits'.
Adjusted the Lore text back to that of Cruel Limits.
Patch 7.4.0 [ edit ] Change: Cruel Limits is now once again a Unique Perk.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Cull the Weak
official_description: Each time you hook a Survivor other than your Obsession, you gain +1 Token: For as long as the Obsession is alive, all other Survivors suffer from a stack-able 2 / 2.5 / 3 % per Token Action Speed penalty to Repairing, Healing, and Sabotaging, up to a maximum of 22 / 27.5 / 33 % or 11 Tokens. | The Obsession is unaffected by this penalty and instead granted a permanent +33 % Action Speed bonus to Unhooking and Healing other Survivors. | You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
description_ar: بيرك Cull the Weak يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 3.2.0 [ edit ] Rework: Dying Light now gains a Token each time a Survivor is hooked that is not the Killer's Obsession and as long as the Obsession remains alive, all other Survivors will be affected by a penalty to their Repair, Healing and Sabotage speed. The Obsession on the other hand gains a boost to the speed of unhooking and healing other Survivors.

Patch 9.4.0 [ edit ] Change: following the departure of CHAPTER 2: The HALLOWEEN® Chapter from Dead by Daylight in January 2026, this Patch changes Dying Light depending on whether or not Players own the Chapter or not: For Players owning CHAPTER 2, the Perk remains unchanged as a Unique Perk belonging to The Shape. This includes the original name and flavour text.
For all other Players, the Perk is changed into a General Perk available to all Killers, renaming it to Cull the Weak.

name: Dark Arrogance
official_description: "When everything is going right, you are an inescapable inevitability." Whenever you are vaulting a Window, you benefit from the following effect: Increases the Vaulting speed by 15 / 20 / 25 %. | Whenever you are stunned with a Pallet or blinded by any means, you suffer from the following effects: Reduces the Recovery speed from Pallet Stuns by -15 %. | Increases the duration of Killer Blinds by +15 %. | "Run all you want. I will not be denied." — Vecna

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the penalty to Stun Recovery from -25 % to -15 %. Note that despite the Patch Notes and Perk description acknowledging this buff, the code governing this effect was not updated until Patch 9.2.3, meaning that Dark Arrogance still applied the old penalty for another month.
Buff: reduced the penalty to Blind duration from +25 % to +15 %.

Calculations [ edit ] Perk Tier Vaulting time Stunned time Blinded time Default 1.7 seconds 2 seconds 2 seconds Tier I ~1.478 seconds ~2.353 seconds 2.3 seconds Tier II ~1.417 seconds Tier III 1.36 seconds

name: Dark Devotion
official_description: "The display of your Powers creates a whirlwind of panic that spreads throughout the land." Whenever the Obsession becomes injured by any means, Dark Devotion activates for 35 / 40 / 45 seconds: Transfers your Terror Radius to the Obsession. This Terror Radius is set to 40 metres. | | Grants the Undetectable Status Effect. | You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time. "And terror shall take hold of a defiant non-believer, who shall falsely announce my arrival." — (The Tablet of Adiris, 48.9)

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 3.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: removed the Cool-down of 60 / 45 / 30 seconds.
Buff: modified and increased the duration of the Obsession's Terror Radius from a fixed 20 seconds across all Tiers to a variable 20 / 25 / 30 seconds.
Patch 3.4.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: updated the Perk with the Undetectable Status Effect.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: removed the Basic Attack condition, allowing it to activate from any damage that causes the healthy Obsession to become injured.
Patch 9.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the range of the Obsession's Terror Radius from 32 metres to 40 metres.
Buff: further increased the durations of the Obsession's Terror Radius from 20 / 25 / 30 seconds to 35 / 40 / 45 seconds.

official_description: "In your presence, places once thought to be safe are perhaps the most dangerous." Searching a Locker has the following effect: The Auras of Survivors within 8 metres of any Locker are revealed to you for 6 / 7 / 8 seconds. | Darkness Revealed has a cool-down of 30 seconds. "Stay in the light, my children. In darkness, your fear will expose you." — Otto Stamper

name: Dead Man's Switch
official_description: After hooking a Survivor, Dead Man's Switch triggers its effect: Blocks the first Generator any Survivor stops repairing for 25 / 30 / 35 seconds. The Blocked Generator is highlighted to you in white. | | Dead Man's Switch cannot activate if its effect is still active from a previous activation. "I've seen the look on a man's face when he realises he's going to die." — Caleb Quinn

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: now activates on hooking any Survivor, not just the Obsession.

Patch 6.1.2 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the duration from 35 / 40 / 45 seconds to 20 / 25 / 30 seconds. This change was due to the former synergy with Scourge Hook: Pain Resonance having been restored in the same Patch.
Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: no longer features a limited Activation window, transforming it into a Block duration instead.
Buff: increased the Block duration from 20 / 25 / 30 seconds to 40 / 45 / 50 seconds. This change compensates for the nerf to blocking at most one Generator at the same time.

Nerf: now only activates on the first Generator any Survivor stops repairing after another was hooked. This change was motivated by Dead Man's Switch quickly getting out of hand when combined with other Perks, due to its own powerful effect.
Nerf: cannot activate if it is still blocking a previous Generator.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Block duration from 40 / 45 / 50 seconds to 25 / 30 / 35 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Deathbound
official_description: "Those whose lives are intertwined in darkness are destined to suffer together." Whenever a Survivor finishes healing another Survivor for the equivalent of 1 Health State, Deathbound activates: Causes the Healer to scream and reveal their location. | Causes the Healer to suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect whenever they are farther than 12 / 8 / 4 metres from the other Survivor. | The Healer sees the Aura of the Healed Survivor while Deathbound is active. | Deathbound deactivates after the Healer loses a Health State.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.6.0 [ edit ] Change: modified the behaviour of the triggered Survivor screams to be consistent across all Unlockables: Survivor screams are now 3D with a maximum audible range of 19 metres (used to be a map-wide 2D scream).
Triggers a Loud Noise Notification.

Patch 6.6.2 [ edit ] Reversal: reverted the behaviour of Survivor screams to their original functionality. The reversal was motivated by the Community's negative response to the range limit, which caused the Perks to end up being weaker than before.
Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: no longer has a range limit to its Activation condition.
Buff: Oblivious no longer has a fixed duration once activated, but rather lasts until the Healer loses a Health State.
Patch 8.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the distance the Healer can be from the other Survivor, before they suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect from 16 / 12 / 8 metres to 12 / 8 / 4 metres.
Undocumented Nerf: now reveals the Aura of the Healed Survivor to the Healer whenever Deathbound is active.

name: Deerstalker
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability. Whenever a Survivor reads your Aura, Deerstalker activates for the same duration as their Aura-reading action: The Aura of that Survivor is revealed to you. | Furthermore, the following effect triggers automatically every 40 / 35 / 30 seconds: Your Aura is revealed for 3 seconds to the Survivor with currently the lowest cumulative Chase time. |
description_ar: بيرك Deerstalker يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Deerstalker يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يضغط على المولدات أو يكشف أماكن الناجين.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.1.2 [ edit ] Nerf: no longer applies its effect when a Dying Survivor is being healed. This nerf was motivated by the recent introduction of A Nurse's Calling. Since back then, a Survivor's character model would change into a crouched position while being healed, Killers received additional information from Deerstalker that should have been exclusive to A Nurse's Calling, which was not intended.
Patch 2.6.3 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Aura-reading ranges from 12 / 24 / 36 metres to 20 / 28 / 36 metres.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Rework: reworked to function as a Killer-version of Object of Obsession: Reveals the Aura of whichever Survivors is currently reading your Aura and for the same duration.
Automatically reveals your Aura to whichever Survivors has the lowest total chase time at a regular interval.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Discordance
official_description: Any Generator within a range of 64 / 96 / 128 metres that is being repaired by 2 or more Survivors is marked by a yellow Aura. When the Generator is first highlighted, Discordance triggers a Loud Noise Notification on the Generator. | After the Generator is no longer within range or is being repaired by just 1 Survivor, the highlighted Aura will linger for another 4 seconds. | "Smartasses get killed. We always see to that." — The Legion
description_ar: بيرك Discordance يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Legion. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Discordance يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Legion. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.3.0 [ edit ] Rework: now triggers a Loud Noise notification on any Generator within a set range that is being repaired by two or more Survivors and highlights its Aura in yellow.
Buff: the Aura-highlight stays for as long as the activation condition is being met and lingers for 8 seconds after leaving the range or if just one Survivor remains repairing.
Patch 4.3.2 [ edit ] Buff: considerably increased the activation ranges to 64 / 96 / 128 metres.
Buff: reduced the lingering time for the Aura-highlight to 4 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Dissolution
official_description: "Everything turns to dust. It is as inescapable as the coming of the night." After 3 seconds of injuring a Survivor by any means, Dissolution activates for 12 / 16 / 20 seconds: Instantly breaks the next Pallet that Survivor performs a Fast Vault across while inside your Terror Radius. | "The Garden shall be a place of perfect Joy; through Joy, nothing shall stand in our way." — Otto Stamper
description_ar: بيرك Dissolution يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Dredge. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

official_description: "Your horrifying emanation strikes at a supernaturally long distance." You benefit from the following permanent effect: Increases your Terror Radius by 20 / 25 / 30 %. |

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Range extension from 8 / 16 / 24 % to 22 / 24 / 26 %.
Buff: increased the Bloodpoint bonus to 50 / 75 / 100 %'.
Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: changed the Bloodpoint bonus to +100 % across all Tiers.
Patch 8.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: further increased the Range extension from 22 / 24 / 26 % to 20 / 25 / 30 %.
Change: removed the secondary effect that granted bonus Bloodpoints mid-Trial, which would just fill the Deviousness Category faster.

name: Dominance
official_description: The power you wield over the land strikes terror in the hearts of all who cross your path. The first time each Chest and each Totem are interacted with by a Survivor, Dominance triggers its effect: Calls upon The Entity to block it for 8 / 12 / 16 seconds. | The Aura of the blocked Prop is revealed to you in white. | "Tragic, is it not? How powerless you must feel." — Dracula
description_ar: بيرك Dominance يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Dark Lord. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: doubled the block duration from 4 / 6 / 8 seconds to 8 / 12 / 16 seconds.

name: Dragon's Grip
official_description: After performing the Damage Generator action on a Generator, Dragon's Grip activates for 30 seconds. While active, the first Survivor interacting with that Generator suffers from the following effects: Causes them to scream and reveal their location for 4 seconds. | Inflicts the Exposed Status Effect for 60 seconds. | Dragon's Grip has a cool-down of 60 / 45 / 30 seconds. "Such potential in this compound... even the slightest trace causes unnatural effects." — Journal of Talbot Grimes

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.6.0 [ edit ] Change: modified the behaviour of the triggered Survivor screams to be consistent across all Unlockables: Survivor screams are now 3D with a maximum audible range of 19 metres (used to be a map-wide 2D scream).
Triggers a Loud Noise Notification.

Patch 6.6.2 [ edit ] Reversal: reverted the behaviour of Survivor screams to their original functionality. The reversal was motivated by the community's negative response to the range limit, which caused the Perks to end up weaker than before.
Patch 8.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: halved the Cool-down durations from 120 / 100 / 80 seconds to 60 / 50 / 40 seconds.
Patch 9.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: further reduced the Cool-down durations of from 60 / 50 / 40 seconds to 60 / 45 / 30 seconds.

name: Enduring
official_description: "You are resilient to pain." You benefit from the following effect: Reduces the duration of Pallet Stuns by 40 / 45 / 50 %. This effect does not apply when stunned while carrying a Survivor. | | "He stops at nothing."
description_ar: بيرك Enduring يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Hillbilly. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.2.1 [ edit ] Buff: added new condition that reduces the Stun Timer caused Perks (at the time namely Decisive Strike ) by 20 % across all Tiers.
Hotfix 1.2.1d [ edit ] Buff: increased the Stun Timer reduction by 35 % across all Tiers.

Patch 1.7.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: now applies its modifiers to all stuns. This was bugged and did not apply the correct value. The actual values that were applied were a Recovery Time reduction of 20 / 28 / 35 %.
Buff: increased the Stun Recovery rate to 50 / 60 / 75 %.
Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: fixed the change introduced in Patch 1.7.0; Enduring now applies its modifiers correctly to all stuns.

Patch 3.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: changed Enduring to reduce the Stun Timer by 40 / 45 / 50 % instead of accelerating the Recovery rate and adjusted the description accordingly. Albeit having lower values than before, this change is a buff as these values now affect the Stun Timer directly.
Nerf: no longer affects stuns triggered by Perks.
Patch 5.6.1 [ edit ] Nerf: no longer works while carrying a Survivor.

name: Eruption
official_description: "The NE-α parasite provides you with the intelligence and awareness needed to set a trap." Performing the Damage Generator action on Generators highlights their Auras in yellow. Whenever a Survivor enters the Dying State by any means, Eruption triggers the following effects on all highlighted Generators: Causes them to explode, damaging them. Instantly regresses them by -10 % of their total Progression. | Causes them to start regressing afterwards. | | Causes all Survivors currently repairing them to suffer from the following effects: Causes them to scream. | Their Auras are revealed to you for 8 / 10 / 12 seconds. | | Eruption has a cool-down of 30 seconds after triggering its effects, which also resets the highlighted Auras. "It can use weapons?" — Jill Valentine

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Regression penalty from -6 % to -10 %.
Buff: increased the duration of the Incapacitated Status Effect from 12 / 14 / 16 seconds to 15 / 20 / 25 seconds.
Patch 6.6.0 [ edit ] Rework: now reveals the Auras of Survivors repairing an affected Generator for 12 seconds instead of applying the Incapacitated Status Effect.

Change: modified the behaviour of the triggered Survivor screams to be consistent across all Unlockables: Survivor screams are now 3D with a maximum audible range of 19 metres (used to be a map-wide 2D scream).
Triggers a Loud Noise Notification.

Patch 6.6.2 [ edit ] Reversal: reverted the behaviour of Survivor screams to their original functionality. The reversal was motivated by the community's negative response to the range limit, which caused the Perks to end up weaker than before.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Fire Up
official_description: The increased pressure of losing your preys fills you with anger and gives you unsuspected motivation. For each completed Generator, Fire Up gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens: Increases the Action speeds for the following interactions by a stack-able 4 / 5 / 6 % per Token, up to a maximum of 20 / 25 / 30 %: Picking up and dropping Survivors. | Breaking Breakable Walls and dropped Pallets. | Damaging Generators. | Vaulting Windows. | | "Now why don't you just fucking die?" — Freddy Krueger

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Rework: the Tokens now apply a stack-able bonus.
Patch 8.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the stack-able bonus per Token from 3 / 3.5 / 4 % to 4 / 5 / 6 %.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Forced Hesitation
official_description: "You have learnt the emotional weaknesses of the organics, and how to exploit them." Whenever a Survivor is put into the Dying State by any means, Forced Hesitation triggers its effect: Causes all other Survivors within 16 metres of them suffer from a -20 % Hindered Status Effect for 10 seconds. | Forced Hesitation has a cool-down of 40 / 35 / 30 seconds. "THE ORGANIC MIND'S CAPACITY FOR EMPATHY GOES BEYOND HINDRANCE!" — HUX-A7-13

name: Forced Penance
official_description: "Those who stand in the way of duty will suffer harsh judgement." Whenever a Survivor triggers a Protection Hit, they suffer from the following effect: Inflicts the Broken Status Effect for 60 / 70 / 80 seconds. |
description_ar: بيرك Forced Penance يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Executioner. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.7.2 [ edit ] Nerf: only Basic Attacks cause Survivors to drop their Items now.
Patch 4.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: Buff: now reveals the Aura of dropped Items to the Killer. The Aura-colour ranges from white to red, depending on how close the Item is to being consumed by The Entity.

Change: instead of causing the dropped Item to lose its Charges over time, the Item itself is now on a timer, which causes it to be consumed by The Entity once the timer elapses. The timer is reset once a Survivor picks the Item up.
The Survivor who originally owned the Item will see a Status icon next to their Perks, displaying the timer on the Item.

Patch 5.0.0 [ edit ] Rework: Change: due to the introduction of Limited Items, the behaviour of Franklin's Demise was partially reverted to its previous iteration, causing dropped Items to once again lose Charges over time, rather than being consumed over time.
Patch 7.0.0 [ edit ] Nerf: no longer affects Limited Items, as they now have their own slot.
Patch 9.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: modified and increased the Aura-reading range from a fixed 32 metres across all Tiers to a variable 32 / 48 / 64 metres.
Nerf: no longer causes dropped Items to lose their Charges over time.

name: Friends 'til the End
official_description: "You will kill anyone who gets between you and your target." When you hook any Survivors that is not the Obsession, the following effects apply to the Obsession: Their Aura is revealed for 6 / 8 / 10 seconds. | They suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 20 seconds. | When you hook the Obsession, the following effects apply to a random Survivor: Causes the Survivor to scream and reveal their location to the Killer. | They become the new Obsession. | You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time. "I got some fresh meat lined up, and I'm not gonna let you spoil it, not this time!" — Chucky

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.5.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: Removed a penalty that caused Furtive Chase to lose all Tokens once the Obsession was either killed or sacrificed.

Patch 7.3.0 [ edit ] Rework: Reworked the Perk from a Token-based Terror-Radius-Shrinker while chasing Survivors to now temporarily grant the Undetectable and Haste Status Effects whenever you hook the Obsession, while retaining the Obsession-Switching effect.
Patch 8.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: Doubled the strength of the Haste Status Effect from +5 % to +10 %.
Patch 9.3.0 [ edit ] Reversal: Restored the Perk to its previous iteration, but without the downsides that it had.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: now triggers on the Survivor losing a Health State instead of completing a Healing action. This change was motivated by the Exhausted Status Effect often expiring before the Killer could benefit from its effect, due to Survivors usually not healing near them.
Nerf: reduced the effect duration from 24 / 28 / 32 seconds to 6 / 7 / 8 seconds. This change compensates for the better Activation condition.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Grim Embrace
official_description: Your act of servitude to The Entity has not gone unnoticed. Each time a Survivor is hooked for the first time, Grim Embrace gains +1 Token and activates once you are at least 16 metres away from the Hook: 1-3 Tokens: Blocks all Generators for 6 / 8 / 10 seconds. | 4 Tokens: Blocks all Generators for 40 seconds and the Aura of the Obsession is revealed to you for 6 seconds. | "Are we nothing but prisoners to our sorrow?" — Carmina Mora
description_ar: بيرك Grim Embrace يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Artist. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] QoL (undocumented): increased the Aura-reveal duration from 5 seconds to 6 seconds. This change was most likely motivated by general changes to the Hooking interaction in the same Patch, which moved the Survivor's scream from triggering after the Hook pierces them to just before they are put onto the Hook itself, about a second earlier.

Since this also moved the activation trigger for Grim Embrace to be about a second earlier, the Aura-reveal duration was increased by that second to compensate for the Killer still being stuck in the Hooking animation when the Aura-reveal begins, unable to move their camera around and make use of the Aura-reveal effect.
This change is deemed a Quality of Life change because of that, as the resulting usable Aura-reveal duration of the Perk remains effectively the same.
Patch 7.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: now also blocks Generators for a shorter duration when having just 1-3 Tokens.
Buff: changed the Block duration on 4 Tokens from a variable 30 / 35 / 40 seconds to a fixed 40 seconds.
Nerf: added a stipulation to first leave the Anti-Camping range around the hooked Survivor before Grim Embrace will trigger its effect.
Patch 8.0.0 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the duration of the Generator blocking for the first 3 Tokens by 2 seconds to 6 / 8 / 10 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Haywire
official_description: "For some reason, machinery has a habit of failing when you are near." Whenever a Survivor stops opening an Exit Gate after accumulating at least 80 % Progression towards being opened, Haywire causes it to regress: Regresses at a rate of 80 / 90 / 100 % of the normal Gate-Opening speed. | Causes Survivors to see the lights atop the switch flickering randomly while it regresses. | "There will be no redemption for you." — Springtrap

Nerf: increased the minimum PTB-Progression threshold from 50 % to 80 %.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Help Wanted
official_description: "Try as they might, you know how to stay one step ahead of your guests." After performing the Damage Generator action, Help Wanted activates: Causes that Generator to become a Compromised Generator. | Once the Compromised Generator is completed, you benefit from the following effect for 40 / 50 / 60 seconds: Increases the Recovery speed of successful Basic Attacks by +25 %. | "You only think you are in control..." — Springtrap
description_ar: بيرك Help Wanted يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Animatronic. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Help Wanted يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Animatronic. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يضغط على المولدات أو يكشف أماكن الناجين.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.

name: Hex: Blood Favour
official_description: "A Hex that gains the favour of The Entity when blood is spilt." Hex: Blood Favour lights a Hex Totem at the start of the Trial, cursing Survivors with its Hex Effects. Whenever a Survivor loses a Health State by any means, Hex: Blood Favour triggers its effect for 15 seconds: Blocks all upright Pallets within 24 / 28 / 32 metres of that Survivor. Blocked Pallets cannot be dropped by any Survivor. | | The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "It would be no leap of the imagination to suggest that the Trials are a biological response of sorts." — Journal of Talbot Grimes
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Blood Favour يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Blight. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Hex: Blood Favour يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Blight. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يضغط على المولدات أو يكشف أماكن الناجين.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Pallet-Blocking radius to 24 / 28 / 32 metres.
Buff: removed the Cool-down penalty.
Buff: changed the Activation condition to be based on the Survivor losing a Health State, allowing it to also trigger from Special Attacks, but not from non-injuring variants.
Quality of Life: changed the Effect range to be centred on the location of the Survivor, rather than that of the Killer.
Nerf: no longer blocks Pallets located on a different floor to the one the Survivor is currently on.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Hex: Crowd Control
official_description: "A Hex that ensures those lesser than you are properly herded." Whenever a Survivors performs a Rushed Vault action at a Window, Hex: Crowd Control activates on a random Totem and triggers its effect: Blocks that Window for all Survivors. | Increases basic-vault speed of blocked Windows by 15 % | Reveals auras of blocked Windows within 24 metres | Hex: Crowd Control has a limit of 4 / 5 / 6 Windows it can affect at a time. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "You have no control. People like you never did." — Ji-Woon Hak
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Crowd Control يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Trickster. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Effect duration from 10 / 12 / 14 seconds to 14 / 17 / 20 seconds.
Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: further increased the Effect duration from 14 / 17 / 20 seconds to 40 / 50 / 60 seconds.
Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Rework: Buff: blocked Windows now remain blocked indefinitely until the Hex Totem is cleansed or it is the oldest blocked Window and another one is vaulted.
Nerf: now only affects a limited number of recently vaulted Windows, with the oldest one becoming unblocked upon reaching the limit. This change compensates for the removed Duration limit.
Patch 9.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: this perk's Hex Totem now lights up when it's effects are first triggered.
Buff: increased maximum amount of Windows that can be blocked by this Perk to 4 / 5 / 6 from 3 / 4 / 5.
Buff: added an effect of increasing basic-vault speed when vaulting blocked Windows.
Buff: added an effect of revealing blocked Window auras.

name: Hex: Devour Hope
official_description: "A Hex rooting its power on hope. The false hope of Survivors ignites your hunger." Hex: Devour Hope lights a Hex Totem at the start of the Trial, cursing Survivors with its Hex Effects. Whenever a Survivor is unhooked at least 24 metres from your location, Hex: Devour Hope gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens: At 2 Tokens: 10 seconds after hooking a Survivor, you are granted a 3 / 4 / 5 % Haste Status Effect for 10 seconds. | At 3 Tokens: Afflicts all Survivors with the Exposed Status Effect. | At 5 Tokens: Unlocks the Kill ability, allowing you to kill dying Survivors by your own hands. | The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "If you do nothing, you have their blood on your hands. If you save them, her hunger grows."
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Devour Hope يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Hag. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Hex: Devour Hope يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Hag. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.5.0 [ edit ] Rework: replaced the Repair Speed penalty with a Haste bonus. Buff: added a +5 % Haste Status Effect at 2 Tokens.
Nerf: removed the Repair Speed penalty of -5 % at 1 Token.
Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Rework: instead of tier-based effects, the Perk now has tier-based variables. Buff: now features an effect on Tier I and Tier II at 2 Tokens.
Buff: now features an effect on Tier I at 3 Tokens.
Change: modified the Haste Status Effect from a fixed +5 % to a variable 3 / 4 / 5 %.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Hex: Face the Darkness
official_description: "You make an example of one of your victims, forcing their allies to become awed by your power." If there is still a Dull Totem in the environment, Hex: Face the Darkness lights a Hex Totem after injuring a Survivor by any means, cursing them with its Hex Effects. While cursed, the following effects trigger once every 35 / 30 / 25 seconds on all other Survivors outside of the Terror Radius: Causes them to scream. | Their Auras are revealed to you for 2 seconds. | Hex: Face the Darkness is deactivated once the Cursed Survivor either returns to Healthy or enters the Dying State by any means, extinguishing the Hex Totem. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "I shall make an example of one. These mewling worms will never know peace." — Tarhos Kovács
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Face the Darkness يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Knight. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Hex: Face the Darkness يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Knight. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.6.0 [ edit ] Change: modified the behaviour of the triggered Survivor screams to be consistent across all Unlockables: Survivor screams are now 3D with a maximum audible range of 19 metres (used to be a map-wide 2D scream).
Triggers a Loud Noise Notification.

Patch 6.6.2 [ edit ] Reversal: reverted the behaviour of Survivor screams to their original functionality. The reversal was motivated by the community's negative response to the range limit, which caused the Perks to end up weaker than before.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Hex: Fortune's Fool
official_description: "A Hex that toys with a victim's suffering." If there is still a Dull Totem in the environment, Hex: Fortune's Fool lights a Hex Totem whenever you hook a Survivor for the first time, cursing them with its Hex Effects. Inflicts the Oblivious Status Effect. | Blocks the Hex Totem for all other Survivors for 90 seconds. Blocked Hex Totems cannot be cleansed or blessed by Survivors. | This does not affect the Cursed Survivor. | | The Aura of the Hex Totem is revealed to the Cursed Survivor within 24 / 20 / 16 metres. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Fortune's Fool يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.0.0 [ edit ] Change: following the departure of CHAPTER 21: Hellraiser™ from Dead by Daylight in March 2025, this Patch changes Hex: Plaything depending on whether or not Players own the Chapter or not: For Players owning CHAPTER 21, the Perk remains unchanged as a Unique Perk belonging to The Cenobite. This includes the original name, icon and flavour text.
For all other Players, the Perk is changed into a General Perk available to all Killers, renaming it to Hex: Fortune's Fool, but retaining its original icon.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Hex: Haunted Ground
official_description: Hex: Haunted Ground lights 2 Hex Totems at the start of the Trial, laying a trap for Survivors. Blessing or cleansing either Hex Totem trips the trap and triggers the following effect: Causes all Survivors to suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 40 / 50 / 60 seconds. | Hex: Haunted Ground extinguishes the second Hex Totem after tripping its trap. Hex: Haunted Ground is disabled for the remainder of the Trial after triggering its effect. "Her home become profane."
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Haunted Ground يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Spirit. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Hex: Hive Mind
official_description: "You found yourself connected to something dark and unknowable... and you embraced it." The first time you hook any Survivor, a random Dull Totem becomes a Hex Totem, provided that a Dull Totem remains in the Trial Grounds. Generators are highlighted; the intensity of the generator's Auras reveals their repair progress. As soon as a total of 4 generators have been completed in the Trial: All remaining generators explode, lose 6 / 8 / 10 % progess, and start regressing. | The associated Hex Totem becomes dull, and this perk becomes disabled for the remainder of the trial. | The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "You... let us in. And now, you are going to have to let us stay" — Henry Creel
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Hive Mind يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The First. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Hex: Huntress Lullaby
official_description: "A Hex rooting its power in despair. Your hunt is an irresistible song of dread which muddles your prey's attention." Survivors performing Healing or Repairing actions suffer from the following effect: Increases the Progression penalty for Failed Skill Checks by 2 / 4 / 6 %. | Each time a Survivor is hooked, Hex: Huntress Lullaby grows in power and gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens. Survivors performing Healing or Repairing actions suffer from the following additional effect: Reduces the time between the audio cue announcing an imminent Skill Check and it appearing, depending on the number of accumulated Tokens: 1 Token: -14 % | 2 Tokens: -28 % | 3 Tokens: -42 % | 4 Tokens: -56 % | 5 Tokens: Suppresses the audio cue altogether. | | The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "That song, it drives me crazy!"
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Huntress Lullaby يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Huntress. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.3.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: now only reveals the Cursed Status Effect after gaining its first Token.
Nerf: now only affects Healing and Repair Skill Checks.
<span class="mw-headline"

name_ar: هكس: لا أحد يهرب من الموت
name: Hex: No One Escapes Death
nameAr: هكس: لا أحد يهرب من الموت
official_description: "A Hex rooting its power on hope. You are animated by the power of your Hex Totem when the Survivors are on the verge of escaping." Once the Exit Gates are powered, if there is still a Dull Totem remaining in the environment, Hex: No One Escapes Death activates and lights it: Grants a 2 / 3 / 4 % Haste Status Effect. | Causes all Survivors to suffer from the Exposed Status Effect. | Once the Status Effect is revealed to Survivors, Hex: No One Escapes Death triggers the following effect: The Aura of its Hex Totem is revealed to all Survivors within 4 metres. This range gradually expands to 24 metres over the course of 30 seconds. | | Hex: No One Escapes Death remains inactive if no Dull Totems are available. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "And the beast became faster and more powerful as if The Entity's shadowy whips were lashing at its back."
description_ar: بيرك Hex: No One Escapes Death يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.0.2 [ edit ] Change: updated the description to match the Perk's bugged behaviour of already activating once the Exit Gates were powered, rather than after one was opened, acknowledging it as an intended feature.
Patch 1.0.5 [ edit ] Nerf: the Perk is now on a timer of 120 seconds upon activation, instead of lasting permanently.
Nerf: reduced the Movement Speed bonus from 3 / 5 / 5 % to 3 / 4 / 4 %.

Patch 1.5.0 [ edit ] Rework: turned the Perk into a Hex Perk. Reversal: reversed the previous change that had added a timer, making the Perk permanent again upon activation (given that its Hex Totem remains uncleansed).
Nerf: the Perk can now be deactivated by Survivors cleansing its Hex Totem.
Nerf: Survivors can now prevent the activation of the Perk altogether by cleansing all Dull Totems before powering the Exit Gates.
Change: updated the Perk with the Exposed and Haste Status Effects.
Patch 2.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: now applies the Exposed Status Effect on all Tiers.

name: Hex: Nothing but Misery
official_description: "You've been driven to the absolute depths of pain, and now you're ready to inflict that pain on others." After damaging Survivors a total of 8 times with Basic Attacks, a random Dull Totem becomes a Hex Totem, cursing all Survivors: Survivors damaged by a Basic Attack suffer from a -5 % Hindered Status Effect for 10 / 12.5 / 15 seconds. | The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "All of the liabilities of this world are due to the inadequacies of the person involved." — Ken Kaneki
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Nothing but Misery يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Ghoul. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Hex: Overture of Doom
official_description: "A hex that plays on the paranoia of others." Creates a Hex Totem that curses the farthest Generator from its location: The Aura of the Cursed Generator is highlighted in yellow. | When a Survivor repairs the Cursed Generator for at least 5 seconds, Hex: Overture of Doom triggers the following effects for 20 / 25 / 30 seconds: Transfers your Terror Radius to the Cursed Generator. This Terror Radius is set to 32 metres. | | Grants the Undetectable Status Effect. | Once the Cursed Generator is repaired, the next farthest Generator becomes cursed. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "From salvation's ruin, be warned/death comes from all around." — Giovanni Serrata's "Fog Hill"
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Overture of Doom يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Krasue. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Hex: Pentimento
official_description: "You reveal the true power of the Totems, hidden within their remains." Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of cleansed Totems are revealed to you in white. | Press the Interaction button over the remains of a cleansed Totem to resurrect it as a Rekindled Totem. For each Rekindled Totem, Hex: Pentimento gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens: 1 Token: Reduces the Action speeds for Healing and Repairing by -20 %. | 2 to 5 Tokens: Increase the strength of the Action Speed penalty by a stackable 1 / 2 / 3 % per Token, up to a maximum of 24 / 28 / 32 %. | Survivors cursed by Hex: Pentimento see the Auras of Rekindled Totems within 16 metres. | Once Hex: Pentimento has reached its limit of 5 Tokens, it calls upon The Entity for the following effect: Blocks all Rekindled Totems for the remainder of the Trial. | Totems may only be rekindled once per Trial, with The Entity consuming the remains of Rekindled Totems once they are cleansed. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "Though a pentimento is an inherently concealed piece of art, there is something to be said of the desire to discover that which is beyond." — A Guide to Art & Process (1961)

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.7.0 [ edit ] Rework: no longer adds an additional effect with each Token, but now applies a set of effects from the first Token already, which instead increases in strength with each additional Token. Buff: moved the Healing effect to the first Token.
Buff: each Token increases the strength of the effect by an additional 1 / 2 / 3 %.
Nerf: reduced and modified the starting value from a variable 20 / 25 / 30 % to a fixed -20 % across all Tiers.
Nerf: no longer affects the Action speeds for Gate-Opening and Recovery.
Nerf: the Auras of Rekindled Totems are now revealed to Survivors within 16 metres.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Hex: Retribution
official_description: "A Hex that lashes out upon its destruction. Those who cross you will be punished." Whenever a Survivor blesses or cleanses a Totem, Hex: Retribution triggers its primary effect: Causes that Survivor to suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for 40 / 50 / 60 seconds. | Whenever a Hex Totem is removed by any means, including its own, Hex: Retribution triggers its secondary effect: The Auras of all Survivors are revealed to you for 20 seconds. | The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "Bloody fool, you pulled the trigger on yourself." — Caleb Quinn
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Retribution يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Deathslinger. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: now triggers the primary effect regardless of the type of Totem that is cleansed or blessed.
Buff: increased the Aura-reveal duration of the secondary effect from 10 seconds to 15 seconds.
Quality of Life: expanded the Activation condition to also include the newly introduced Blessing action.
Patch 9.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: further increased the Aura-reveal duration from 15 seconds to 20 seconds.
Buff: increased the duration of Oblivious from 35 / 40 / 45 seconds to 40 / 50 / 60 seconds.

name: Hex: Ruin
official_description: "A Hex that affects the Generator Repair progress of all Survivors." All Generators not currently being repaired experience the following effect: Causes them to automatically regress at 100 / 125 / 150 % of the default Regression rate. | The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is either blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial. "A curse is upon you. It will cause your ruin."
description_ar: بيرك Hex: Ruin يعطي الكيلر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية The Hag. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
