patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: removed the cool-down.
Buff: increased the Aura-reading ranges from a fixed 24 metres to a variable 24 / 28 / 32 metres.
Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: now temporarily reveals the Auras of Survivors who dropped a Pallet.
Nerf: removed the Auras of Breakable Walls from the primary effect.
Patch 8.3.2 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Aura-reveal duration from 6 / 7 / 8 seconds to 3 / 4 / 5 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Ace in the Hole
official_description: "Lady Luck always seems to be throwing something good your way." Causes all regular Items you retrieve from a Chest to come equipped with 1 to 2 Add-ons: First Slot: 100 % chance to be equipped with an Add-on of Visceral Rarity or lower. | Second Slot: 50 / 75 / 100 % chance to be equipped with an Add-on of Uncommon Rarity or lower. | Ace in the Hole prevents any attached Add-ons on your currently held Item to be consumed upon escaping the Trial. "Everything that glitters isn't gold. But gold isn't worth a damn in this place, so this should come in handy." — Ace Visconti
description_ar: بيرك Ace in the Hole يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Ace Visconti. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the chance for a first Add-on to be attached to a found Item from 50 % to 100 %.
Buff: modified the maximum possible Rarity for the first Add-on from a variable Uncommon / Rare / Very Rare to a fixed Very Rare across all Tiers.
Buff: added a variable chance of 10 / 25 / 50 % to find a second Add-on of Uncommon Rarity or lower.
Patch 3.6.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: added a secondary effect that allows Players to keep any Add-ons attached to their Item upon escaping the Trial.
Patch 8.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the maximum possible Rarity for the first Add-on from Very Rare to Ultra Rare.
Buff: increased the chance to find a second Add-on from 10 / 25 / 50 % to 50 / 75 / 100 %.

Rarity Chances [ edit ] Table per Item at Tier 3 Addon Chance per Item Roll per Addon First / Second First / Second First / Second First / Second First / Second Any Common Addon 27.3% / 37.5% 11.1% / 25% 23.1% / 42.9% 11.1% / 16.7% 30.8% / 44.4% Any Uncommon Addon 45.5% / 62.5% 33.3% / 75% 30.8% / 57.1% 55.6% / 83.3% 38.5 / 55.6% Any Rare Addon 18.2% / n/a 11.1% / n/a 15.4% / n/a 22.2% / n/a 15.4% / n/a Any Very Rare Addon - 44.4% / n/a 15.4% / n/a 11.1% / n/a 7.7% / n/a Any Ultra Rare Addon 9.1% / n/a - 15.4% / n/a - 7.7% / n/a <span class="mw-headline"

name: Adrenaline
official_description: "You are fuelled by unexpecting energy when on the verge of escape." Once the Exit Gates are powered, Adrenaline activates and triggers the following effects: Heals you to the next Health State. | Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds. | Adrenaline can be used while Exhausted and ignores an existing Status Effect. Adrenaline causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60 / 50 / 40 seconds after use.
description_ar: بيرك Adrenaline يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Meg Thomas. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.5.0 [ edit ] Rework: Adrenaline now causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60 / 50 / 40 seconds while ignoring existing ones.
Buff: now activates as soon as an Exit Gate receives power, rather than when one is opened.
Quality of Life: updated the Perk with the Haste Status Effect.
Quality of Life: Adrenaline is paused if its user is disabled at the moment it should take effect (i.e. being carried or hooked) and will instead activate once freed.
Patch 1.8.1 [ edit ] Buff: now heals 1 Health State, no matter the state the Survivor was in.
Buff: changed the Haste duration from a variable 3 / 5 / 5 seconds to a fixed 5 seconds across all Tiers.
Quality of Life: Adrenaline now wakes up Survivors inside the Dream World.
Patch 7.7.0 [ edit ] Nerf: no longer pauses if its user is disabled at the moment of activation.

name: Aftercare
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: You see the Auras of the 1 / 2 / 3 most recent Survivor(s) that helped you or vice versa: Rescued from a Hook. | Completed a Healing action on. | | They also see your Aura. | Aftercare resets its effects when you are hooked by the Killer. "A Mercy that Rips the Storm. Oil work to honour my best buddies who happen to be the best musicians I know. Their first album is still my favourite. It got me through a dark time in my life." — Jeff, oil on canvas, 16x16
description_ar: بيرك Aftercare يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Jeff Johansen. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

Patch 2.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: Alert now has an unlimited range.
Buff: removed the cool-down.
Nerf: Alert now reveals the Aura for 3 / 4 / 5 seconds.
Audio Cue [ edit ] Whenever Alert is triggered, this sound cue will play for the Perk user: <span class="mw-headline"

name: Any Means Necessary
official_description: "You stand up for yourself, using whatever's on hand to gain an advantage." Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of dropped Pallets in the environment are revealed to you. | While standing next to a dropped Pallet, press and hold the Active Ability button to trigger the following effect: Resets the Pallet to its upright position over 5 / 4 / 3 seconds. | "I'll hit you with everything I've got. Then I'll do it again." — Yui Kimura

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Cool-down durations from 140 / 130 / 120 seconds to 100 / 80 / 60 seconds.
Quality of Life: added a Score Event for resetting a Pallet.
Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: now reveals the Aura of dropped Pallets.
Patch 6.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: removed the Cool-down durations entirely.
Nerf: changed the Pallet-interaction duration from a fixed 4 seconds to a variable 6 / 5 / 4 seconds.

name: Apocalyptic Ingenuity
official_description: "You salvage what little there is to defend your team." Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of broken Pallets are revealed to you within 24 / 28 / 32 metres. | After unlocking or rummaging through 2 Chests, Apocalyptic Ingenuity gains a special ability. While standing next to the location of a broken Pallet, press and hold the Active Ability button for 4 seconds to use it: Rebuilds it as a Fragile Pallet. Fragile Pallets instantly break when dropped. | | "Without the fences, this place is worthless." — Rick Grimes

name: Appraisal
official_description: "You have a careful eye that notices what many overlook." Start the Trial with 4 Tokens. While standing next to an unlocked and empty Chest, press and hold the Interaction button to perform the Rummage action: Grants the ability to retrieve an extra Item from that Chest. This consumes -1 Token and is limited to twice per Chest. | | Increases the Rummaging speed by 40 / 60 / 80 %. |
description_ar: بيرك Appraisal يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Élodie Rakoto. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.4.0 [ edit ] Nerf: added a Rummage limit of once Chest to the live release. The PTB version had no limit, allowing the user to spend all Tokens on the same Chest, if they so desired.
Patch 9.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Token Count from 3 to 4.
Quality of Life: increased the Rummage limit per Chest from once to twice.

Calculations [ edit ] Chests require 10 Charges to complete the Rummaging interaction. Appraisal functions by increasing the default Action speed of 1 c/s to 1.4 c/s / 1.6 c/s / 1.8 c/s: Bonus Resulting Charge Speed Resulting Charge Time Default +0 % +0 c/s 1.0 c/s 10 seconds Tier I +40 % +0.4 c/s 1.4 c/s ~7.143 seconds Tier II +60 % +0.6 c/s 1.6 c/s 6.25 seconds Tier III +80 % +0.8 c/s 1.8 c/s ~5.555 seconds <span class="mw-headline"

name: Autodidact
official_description: Succeeding a Skill Check while healing another Survivor grants +1 Token, up to a maximum of 3 / 4 / 5 Tokens: Suppresses Great Healing Skill Checks. | Causes Good Healing Skill Checks to grant Healing progress based on the number of accumulated Tokens: 0 Tokens: -15 %. | 1 Token: +0 %. | 2 Tokens: +15 %. | 3 Tokens: +30 % (limit of Tier I ). | 4 Tokens: +45 % (limit of Tier II ). | 5 Tokens: +60 % (limit of Tier III ). | | Autodidact is inactive when healing using a Med-Kit. "There's no limit to what you can achieve, as long as you back with hard work." — Adam Francis

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the initial penalty from -25 % to -15 % at 0 Tokens. This has the effect that the Perk no longer incurs a penalty on the second Skill Check, unlike it previously would.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Babysitter
official_description: "While you have a reputation for being self-centred, you risk it all to help those in need." Whenever you unhook another Survivor, you benefit from the following effect: The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 8 seconds. | The unhooked Survivor benefits from the following effects instead for 20 / 25 / 30 seconds: Suppresses the creation of their Scratch Marks and Pools of Blood. | Increases the strength of their Haste Status Effect by +10 %. | "I promised to keep you shitheads safe, and that's exactly what I plan on doing." — Steve Harrington

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Retired: With the departure of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things from Dead by Daylight, Babysitter was reworked into a General Survivor Perk: Guardian. Rewrote the Lore text in the beginning of the description to be more generic.

This change also replaced the original icon, which showed Steve, with a new one that showed a generic woman shielding a generic man. For Players who had owned CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things before its removal, Guardian would still show the original icon with Steve, the flavour text in the description, and the Character association with Steve.
Buff: Added an additional effect that boosts the unhooked Survivor's Haste Status Effect.
Buff: Now only reveals the Killer's Aura to the Perk user.
Buff: Doubled the Aura-reveal duration from 4 seconds to 8 seconds.
Patch 7.3.3 [ edit ] Reinstation: Reinstated Babysitter with the return of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things. Renamed Guardian back to Babysitter and replaced the altered icon with its original one.
Adjusted the Lore text back to that of Babysitter.
Patch 7.4.0 [ edit ] Change: Babysitter is now once again a Unique Perk.

name: Background Player
official_description: "You are not usually the centre of attention and in some cases, this can be a good thing." Whenever the Killer picks up any other Survivor in the Dying State, Background Player activates for 10 seconds. While active, starting to run triggers the following effect: Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 5 seconds. | Background Player cannot be used while Exhausted. Background Player causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 30 / 25 / 20 seconds after use. "You forget about me?" — Renato Lyra

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.6.0 [ edit ] Rework: now grants the Haste Status Effect when running shortly after a Survivor is picked up, instead of after unhooking another Survivor. This change was motivated due to the Developers deciding that the original iteration of the Perk left the unhooked Survivor too vulnerable.
Nerf: reduced the duration of the Haste Status Effect from 6 seconds to 4 seconds.
Patch 7.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: doubled the strength of the Haste Status Effect from +50 % to +100 %.
Buff: increased the duration of the Haste Status Effect from 4 seconds to 5 seconds.
Quality of Life: prevents other Sprint Perks from triggering while it is active.
Patch 8.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: halved the duration of the Exhausted Status Effect from 60 / 50 / 40 seconds to 30 / 25 / 20 seconds.
Reversal: reduced the strength Haste Status Effect back from +100 % to +50 %.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Balanced Landing
official_description: "Your agility and cat-like relexes are incomparable." While falling from height, you benefit from the following effects: Suppresses all noises related to falling and landing. | Reduces the duration of the Stagger upon landing by -75 %. | Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds. | Balanced Landing cannot be used while Exhausted. Balanced Landing causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60 / 50 / 40 seconds after use. "I have jumped from higher places." — Nea Karlsson

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Speed-Boost duration on Tier III from 2 seconds to 3 seconds.
Buff: reduced the Cool-down from 60 seconds to 40 seconds.
Patch 1.5.0 [ edit ] Change: now causes and is affected by Exhaustion, preventing the combined use of multiple sprint-inducing Perks.
Patch 2.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: the Stagger reduction is now fixed to -75 % across all Tiers.
Buff: the speed-boost upon landing is now available across all Tiers.
Patch 3.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: added a new effect that now muffles all noises associated with falling.
Nerf: being Exhausted now prevents any of its effects from triggering.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Bardic Inspiration
official_description: It's time to give your audience a show. Will you bring the house down or will you choke? Press the Active Ability button while standing and motionless to enter the Performance interaction that lasts up to 15 seconds and empowers other Survivors within 16 metres of your location. The empowering effect depends on the result of you rolling a d20 and lasts for 90 seconds after completing the Performance: 1: You scream, but without notifying the Killer. | 2 - 10: Skill Checks grant +1 % Progression. | 11 - 19: Skill Checks grant +2 % Progression. | 20: Skill Checks grant +3 % Progression. | Bardic Inspiration has a cool-down of 110 / 100 / 90 seconds after completing the Performance or cancelling it. "Listen closely! I'm about to save your life!" — Aestri
description_ar: بيرك Bardic Inspiration يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Aestri Yazar & Baermar Uraz. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Better Together
official_description: "You seek justice and uncover the truth no matter what obstacle stands in your way." While repairing any Generator, you and the other Survivors benefit from the following primary effect: The Aura of that Generator is revealed to all Survivors and highlighted in yellow. | Whenever the Killer downs another Survivor while you are repairing, you benefit from the following secondary effect: The Auras of all Survivors are revealed to you for 20 / 25 / 30 seconds. | "Let's burn that lab to the ground." — Nancy Wheeler

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Retired: with the departure of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things from Dead by Daylight, Better Together was reworked into a General Survivor Perk: Situational Awareness Rewrote the Lore text in the beginning of the description to be more generic.

This change also replaced the original icon, which showed Nancy, with a new one that showed a generic woman. For Players who had owned CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things before its removal, Situational Awareness would still show the original icon with Nancy, the flavour text in the description, and the Character association with Nancy.

Patch 7.3.3 [ edit ] Reinstation: reinstated Better Together with the return of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things. Renamed Situational Awareness back to Better Together and replaced the altered icon with its original one.
Adjusted the Lore text back to that of Better Together.
Patch 7.4.0 [ edit ] Change: Better Together is now once again a Unique Perk.
Patch 9.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Aura-reveal duration of Survivor Auras from 8 / 9 / 10 seconds to 20 / 25 / 30 seconds.
Quality of Life: removed the range limit of the highlighted Generator Aura.

name: Bite the Bullet
official_description: Pain hurts you as much as anyone, but you would prefer others do not know that. When healing yourself or another Survivor, you benefit from the following effects: Suppresses all noises related to Healing and Grunts of Pain. | Failed Healing Skill Checks do not trigger a Loud Noise Notification. Reduces the Penalty to 3 / 2 / 1 % of the total Progression. | | "I can do this." — Leon Scott Kennedy
description_ar: بيرك Bite the Bullet يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Leon Scott Kennedy. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Blast Mine
official_description: "When direct combat is not an option, you still find ways to strike back." After repairing Generators for the equivalent of 40 % of Progression, Blast Mine activates. While active, press the Active Ability button while standing next to a Generator to install a trap to it with a countdown of 100 / 110 / 120 seconds: Trips half-way through the Killer attempting to damage the Trapped Generator: Stuns the Killer for 4 seconds. | Blinds all Players within 12.5 metres of the Trapped Generator. | | The trap is deactivated after its countdown has elapsed or it is tripped. The Auras of Trapped Generators are revealed to all Survivors in yellow. "You want S.T.A.R.S.? I'll give you S.T.A.R.S.!" — Jill Valentine
description_ar: بيرك Blast Mine يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Jill Valentine. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.2.0 [ edit ] Nerf: now Blast Mine deactivates if the timer runs out, forcing the Survivor to repair a Generator to re-earn the Trap.
Patch 6.2.2 [ edit ] Buff: increased the time the Trap stays active to 40 / 45 / 50 seconds.
Buff: reduced the Repair requirement from 66 % to 50 %.
Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: greatly increased the time the Trap stays active to 100 / 110 / 120 seconds.

Patch 7.2.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: when the Perk is active, its Trap can now be placed while standing near a Generator that has partial Progression and no longer requires repairing it for a few seconds.
Patch 8.1.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: now correctly applies Overheat when stunning The Singularity in Overclock Mode.
Patch 8.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Repair requirement from 50 % to 40 %.
Audio Cue [ edit ] The following sound plays upon activating Blast Mine: <span class="mw-headline"

name: Blood Pact
official_description: It is as if a latent part of yourself has awakened. You feel like you can reach out beyond yourself for assistance. When either you or the Obsession become injured by any means, Blood Pact activates: Your Auras are constantly revealed to one another. | Completing a Healing Action on the Obsession or having them complete one on yourself, grants both of you a 5 / 6 / 7 % Haste Status Effect. This effect lasts for as long as you both remain within 16 metres of one another. | | Blood Pact is temporarily disabled if you yourself are the Obsession. Reduces your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by reducing the default value by -100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: removed the duration condition for the Haste Status Effect. The effect now lasts until the two Survivors are more than 16 metres apart from one another.
Nerf: changed the Haste Status Effect from 7 % across all Tiers to 5 / 6 / 7 %.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Blood Rush
official_description: "Your mind and body are honed for great feats, allowing you to push through with extra effort when necessary." After being unhooked by any means, Blood Rush activates for 40 / 50 / 60 seconds. While active, press the Active Ability button to trigger the following effect: Instantly recover from an existing Exhausted Status Effect. | Blood Rush does not cause the Exhausted Status Effect. Blood Rush is deactivated prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action. Blood Rush deactivates after use and is disabled for the remainder of the Trial once the Exit Gates are powered. "Just gotta... push through!" — Renato Lyra

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Rework: modified the Activation condition, the Perk now activates temporarily for 40 / 50 / 60 seconds after being unhooked instead of permanently after accruing 2 Hook States. Buff: the Perk can now activate up to 2 times per Trial.
Buff: no longer causes the Perk User to temporarily lose a Health State and suffer from Broken Status Effect while being auto-healed.
Quality of Life: no longer requires the Perk User to be running to activate.
Nerf: performing a Conspicuous Action now causes the Perk to deactivate.
Nerf: powering the Exit Gates now disables the Perk for the remainder of the Trial.
Audio Cue [ edit ] <span class="mw-headline"

name: Boil Over
official_description: You are a battler and do everything to escape a foe's grasp. While being carried by the Killer, the following effects apply: Increases the strength of the Struggle Effects on the Killer from your Wiggling by 60 / 70 / 80 %. | Suppresses the ability of the Killer to read the Auras of all Hooks within 16 metres. | Grants +33 % of your current Wiggle progression upon landing, if the Killer drops from height. | "Buck and Wild, Swing to be free, Your hands just can't keep ahold of me." — Kate Denson's "Boil Over"
description_ar: بيرك Boil Over يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Kate Denson. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the intensity of the Struggle Effects from 25 / 50 / 75 % to 50 / 75 / 100 %.
Buff: increased the Aura-obscuring range from 10 / 12 / 14 metres to 16 metres across all Tiers.
Buff: added a tertiary effect: Now adds 25 % to the Wiggle Meter if the Killer drops from great heights while carrying the Survivor.

Patch 5.5.2 [ edit ] Nerf: changed the tertiary effect to base its Progression bonus on the Survivor's current Wiggle progression, awarding 33 % of it, rather than a blanket bonus of +25 % of the maximum. This change is considered a nerf, as the new resulting bonus is lower than the old 25 % whenever the Survivor's Wiggle progression is below 75 %.

Patch 5.7.0 [ edit ] Nerf: (Tiers II & III) reduced the intensity of the Struggle Effects from 50 / 75 / 100 % to 60 / 70 / 80 %. This change was done due to some Players experiencing significant issues navigating certain Maps, beyond the intended impact of Boil Over.

Calculations [ edit ] The following calculations give a reference frame of the expected bonus for various example Wiggle progressions: Initial Progression Calculated Bonus Progression (33 %) Resulting Progression 10 % +3.3 % 13.3 % 15 % +4.95 % 19.95 % 20 % +6.6 % 26.6 % 25 % +8.25 % 33.25 % 30 % +9.9 % 39.9 % 40 % +13.2 % 43.2 % 45 % +14.85 % 59.85 % 50 % +16.5 % 66.5 % 60 % +19.8 % 79.8 % 70 % +23.1 % 93.1 % 75 % +24.75 % 99.75 % >75 % +>25 % >100 % <span class="mw-headline"

name: Bond
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of all other Survivors are revealed to you within 20 / 28 / 36 metres. | "We have to work as a team, I need you to survive so that I can survive!" — Dwight Fairfield

<span class="mw-headline"

name: Boon: Circle of Healing
official_description: A Boon that offers comfort amidst the terror. Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem. All Survivors within 24 metres hear soft chimes ringing out and benefit from its Boon Effects: Increases the Altruistic Healing speeds by 50 / 75 / 100 % when not using a Med-Kit. | If a Survivor is injured, their Aura is revealed to all other Survivors. | Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Boon: Circle of Healing at a time. Only one Totem can be blessed by your Boon Perks at a time and all of their effects are active on the same Boon Totem. "Try this, it is better than anything you'll find in a pharmacy." — Mikaela Reid
description_ar: بيرك Boon: Circle of Healing يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Mikaela Reid. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.5.0 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Healing Speed bonus from 90 / 95 / 100 % to 65 / 70 / 75 %.
Patch 5.7.0 [ edit ] Nerf: further reduced the Healing Speed bonus from 65 / 70 / 75 % to 40 / 45 / 50 %.
Patch 6.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: now reveals the Auras of injured Survivors within the range of the Boon Totem to all other Survivors.
Buff: increased the Healing speed bonus to 50 / 75 / 100 %
Nerf: no longer allows Survivors to heal themselves without a Med-Kit.
Nerf: the Healing speed bonus no longer applies to Healing done with a Med-Kit.

Calculations [ edit ] One Health State requires 16 Charges to heal: Healing Type Perk Tier Bonus Percentage Healing Speed: Base Value Healing Speed: Resulting Bonus Healing Speed: Resulting Speed Resulting Healing Time Altruistic Default - 1 c/s - 1 c/s 16 seconds Tier I 50 % +0.5 c/s 1.5 c/s ~10.666 seconds Tier II 75 % +0.75 c/s 1.75 c/s ~9.143 seconds Tier III 100 % +1 c/s 2 c/s 8 seconds <span class="mw-headline"

name: Boon: Dark Theory
official_description: "Your obsessive study of the paranormal has given you unprecedented knowledge of other Realms and planes of existence." Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem. All Survivors within 24 metres hear soft chimes ringing out and benefit from its Boon Effects: Grants a +3 % Haste Status Effect. This effect lingers for 2 / 3 / 4 seconds after leaving the Boon Totem's range. | | Only one Totem can be blessed by your Boon Perks at a time and all of their effects are active on the same Boon Totem.

name: Borrowed Time
official_description: "You are fuelled with an unexpected energy when saving an ally from a hook." Whenever you unhook another Survivor, they benefit from the following effects: Extends the duration of the Endurance Status Effect by 6 / 8 / 10 seconds to 21 / 23 / 25 seconds. Endurance is cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action of any kind. | | Extends the duration of the Haste Status Effect by +10 seconds to 25 seconds. | "Probably stings like hell, but it ain't gonna kill ya. Up and at 'em soldier. Time to move!" — Bill Overbeck

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.7.0 [ edit ] Nerf: Reduced the duration of the Bleed-Out Timer from 30 / 35 / 40 seconds to 15 / 20 / 25 seconds.
Patch 1.9.2 [ edit ] Buff: Can now be used multiple times per Trial.
Nerf: No longer affects its user, but only the unhooked Survivor, making it a purely altruistic Perk.

Patch 2.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: Updated the Perk with the Deep Wound and Endurance Status Effects. This change is considered a buff due to Deep Wound giving Survivors the ability to Mend to prevent going down after the timer elapses, which previously was an inevitability, and also causing the Bleed-Out Timer to be paused while being chased by the Killer.
Nerf: Reduced the Activation timer (i.e. the duration of Endurance ) from 20 seconds to 15 seconds.
Nerf: Further reduced the duration of the Bleed-Out Timer from 15 / 20 / 25 seconds to 10 / 15 / 20 seconds.
Patch 3.4.0 [ edit ] Indirect Buff: Due to the changes to the Deep Wound Status Effect, the Bleed-Out Timer now also pauses while Mending as well as when running.
Patch 4.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: Modified the duration of the Endurance Status Effect from a fixed 15 seconds across all Tiers to a variable 10 / 15 / 20 seconds.

name: Botany Knowledge
official_description: "You transform plants found around the campfire into tinctures that slow down bleeding." You benefit from the following permanent effect: Increases your Healing speed by 30 / 40 / 50 %. | "Basic Botany Knowledge could save your life someday" — Claudette Morel
description_ar: بيرك Botany Knowledge يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Claudette Morel. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.0.2 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced Healing speed and Healing Item efficiency from 10 / 20 / 30 % to 10 / 15 / 20 %.
Patch 2.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased Healing speed and Healing Item efficiency from 10 / 15 / 20 % to 11 / 22 / 33 %.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: further increased the Healing speed from 11 / 22 / 33 % to 30 / 40 / 50 %.
Nerf: now applies a negative modifier to Med-Kit efficiency of -20 %. This change was motivated by the buffed Healing speed being considered too strong with Med-Kits to not have a penalty.
Patch 9.0.0 [ edit ] Reversal: reverted the previous nerf and removed the penalty to Med-Kit efficiency.

Calculations [ edit ] Healing Speed [ edit ] Note: Healing speed is measured in Charges per second. A Health State requires 16 Charges to be completed. Botany Knowledge functions by increasing the default Healing speed ( 1 c/s ) by +0.3 c/s / +0.4 c/s / +0.5 c/s: Healing Time (1 c/s) Tier I (1.3 c/s) Tier II (1.4 c/s) Tier III (1.5 c/s) 16 seconds (1 Health State) ~12.31 seconds ~11.43 seconds ~10.66 seconds 32 seconds (2 Health States) ~24.62 seconds ~22.86 seconds ~21.33 seconds <span class="mw-headline"

name: Bound by Obsession
official_description: "A supernatural bond links you to the Killer." Whenever the Killer reads your Aura, Bound by Obsession activates for the same duration as their Aura-reading action: The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you. | Increases your Action speeds for Cleansing, Healing, and Repairing actions by 2 / 4 / 6 %. | If you are the Killer's current Obsession, the following effect triggers automatically every 30 seconds: Your Aura is revealed to the Killer for 3 seconds. | Increases your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by increasing the default value by +100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
description_ar: بيرك Bound by Obsession يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.7.0 [ edit ] Rework: reworked the Perk to address its negative use cases. Buff: now provides a slight boost to the Survivor's Action speeds for Cleansing, Healing, and Repairing, while their Aura is being read.
Nerf: moved the Activation condition from the Survivor looking in the Killer's direction to the Killer actively reading the Survivor's Aura instead.
Change: now triggers automatically for a short duration at a fixed interval if the Perk User is currently the Obsession.
Patch 6.5.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life (undocumented): moved the timer VFX for the automatic Aura-reveal from a separate icon on the Status HUD to the Perk's own icon instead.
Change (undocumented): effects that shield the Perk User's Aura from being read now cause the automatic timer to reset. This occurs, for example, when hiding inside a Locker.

Patch 9.4.0 [ edit ] Change: following the departure of CHAPTER 2: The HALLOWEEN® Chapter from Dead by Daylight in January 2026, this Patch changes Object of Obsession depending on whether or not Players own the Chapter or not: For Players owning CHAPTER 2, the Perk remains unchanged as a Unique Perk belonging to Laurie Strode. This includes the original name and flavour text.
For all other Players, the Perk is changed into a General Perk available to all Survivors, renaming it to Bound by Obsession.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Breakdown
official_description: After you are unhooked by any means, Breakdown triggers its effects: Instantly breaks that Hook. Increases its Auto-Repair timer to 180 seconds. | | The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 4 / 5 / 6 seconds. | "Charge from the Belly of the Beast. Here's a sketch/painting on a piece of wood I saw by the side of this road. I felt like it got a story to tell. And it didn't waste its second chance." — Jeff, ink and oil wash on slice of wood, 12x16

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 3.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: Hooks broken by the Breakdown now take 180 seconds to auto-repair. This buff compensates for the same Patch also lowering the Auto-Repair timer in general from that same duration to just 30 seconds.

Patch 9.3.0 [ edit ] Note that while this version was technically live, it was not available to Players as the Perk was kill-switched until the Hotfix restoring it to the original version. Rework: Now temporarily increases the Action speed of Healing actions being performed on its user by +100 %, while retaining the effects of breaking the Hook and prolonging its Auto-Repair timer. Nerf: Removed the effect of revealing the Killer's Aura.
Nerf: Halved the duration of the prolonged Auto-Repair timer from 180 seconds to 90 seconds.
Patch 9.3.2 [ edit ] Reversal: Reverted the Perk to its original version.
<span class="mw-headline"

"Ghost beaters never leave a man behind." — Ash Williams

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Aura-reading duration from 4 / 5 / 6 seconds to 6 / 8 / 10 seconds.
Patch 6.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: now provides the picked-up Survivor with a +10 % Haste Status Effect for the same duration as the Aura-reveal effect.
Change: no longer shows the Recovery progress through Aura intensity, as the Survivor Activity HUD now shows the Recovery progress to all Survivors by default.
Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: now provides the Endurance Status Effect to both you and the healed Survivor in addition to the Aura-reveal effect.
Patch 8.0.0 [ edit ] Rework: replaced the Endurance Status Effect for both Survivors with the Haste Status Effect for the healed Survivor.
Patch 8.4.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: updated the in-game description for improved clarity.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Built to Last
official_description: "You know how to get the most out of your tools." While hiding inside a Locker with a depleted Item equipped, Built to Last triggers the following effect after 12 / 10 / 8 seconds: Recharges the Item to one of the following percentages: First time: 99 %. | Second time: 66 %. | Third time: 33 %. | | Built to Last is disabled for the remainder of the Trial after triggering its effect for the third time. "Architecture is the soul of civilisation." — Felix Richter

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Rework: now refills an Item multiple times per Trial, given that the owner hides inside a Locker for a certain amount of time, with the effect diminishing after each use.
Patch 9.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Activation timer from 14 / 13 / 12 seconds to 12 / 10 / 8 seconds.
Audio Cue [ edit ] The following sound plays upon activating Built to Last: <span class="mw-headline"

name: Calm Spirit
official_description: "Animals seem to trust you as they often stay calm in your presence." You experience the following effects during a Trial: Nearby Crows no longer fly off and alert others to your presence, unless you come within touching distance. | Suppresses the urge to scream from any cause at all times. | Suppresses all noises related to interacting with the following Props: Chests | Totems | | Reduces the Action speeds for Blessing, Cleansing, and Unlocking by 40 / 35 / 30 %. |

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the percentages from 70 / 80 / 95 % to 80 / 90 / 100 %.
Patch 2.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: added a secondary effect that suppresses the urge to scream from Killer Powers or being hit.
Patch 2.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: extended the secondary effect to apply to screams caused by any means.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: adjusted the primary effect from a variable 80 / 90 / 100 % to an effective -100 % across all Tiers.
Buff: added a tertiary effect that suppresses all noises related to interacting with Chests or Totems.
Nerf: added a quaternary effect that reduces the Action speeds of those interactions by 40 / 35 / 30 %. This effect acts as a trade-off for the noise and scream suppression.

Calculations [ edit ] Unlocking Chests [ edit ] Chests require inputting 8 Charges at a default rate of 1 c/s in order to be unlocked. Perk Tier Action speed Action duration Default 1 c/s 8 seconds Tier I 0.6 c/s (1 - 0.4) ~13.33 seconds Tier II 0.65 c/s (1 - 0.35) ~12.31 seconds Tier III 0.7 c/s (1 - 0.3) ~11.43 seconds Cleansing Hex / Blessing Dull Totems [ edit ] Hex Totems require inputting 14 Charges at a default rate of 1 c/s in order to be cleansed, whereas Dull Totems require the same values to be blessed. Perk Tier Action speed Action duration Default 1 c/s 14 seconds Tier I 0.6 c/s (1 - 0.4) ~23.33 seconds Tier II 0.65 c/s (1 - 0.35) ~21.54 seconds Tier III 0.7 c/s (1 - 0.3) 20 seconds Blessing Hex Totems [ edit ] Hex Totems require inputting 14 Charges at a default rate of 0.5 c/s in order to be blessed. Perk Tier Action speed Action duration Default 0.5 c/s 28 seconds Tier I 0.3 c/s ((1 - 0.5) * (1 - 0.4)) ~46.66 seconds Tier II 0.325 c/s ((1 - 0.5) * (1 - 0.35)) ~43.08 seconds Tier III 0.35 c/s ((1 - 0.5) * (1 - 0.3)) 40 seconds <span class="mw-headline"

name: Camaraderie
official_description: "Life has taught you the importance of friendship which has given you strength." If you are hooked and enter the Struggle Phase, Camaraderie activates: Pauses the Struggle Phase timer for 26 / 30 / 34 seconds as soon as any Survivor comes within 16 metres of your Hook. | "So, remember once you get in there... pretend like you don't care. There you go, you're learning my friend. You're learning." — Steve Harrington
description_ar: بيرك Camaraderie يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Steve Harrington. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Retired: with the departure of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things from Dead by Daylight, Camaraderie was reworked into a General Survivor Perk: Kinship. Rewrote the Lore text in the beginning of the description to be more generic.
For Players who had owned CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things before its removal, Kinship would still show the original flavour text in the description and the Character association with Steve.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: added an icon to indicate to other Survivors when Camaraderie (then Kinship) is activated.
Patch 7.3.3 [ edit ] Reinstation: reinstated Camaraderie with the return of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things. Renamed Kinship back to Camaraderie.
Adjusted the Lore text back to that of Camaraderie.
Patch 7.4.0 [ edit ] Change: Camaraderie is now once again a Unique Perk.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Champion of Light
official_description: "The glow of the Flashlight looks a little different, feels a little warmer." While shining a Flashlight, Champion of Light triggers its primary effect: Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect. | After blinding the Killer by any means, Champion of Light triggers its secondary effect: Causes the Killer to suffer from a -20 % Hindered Status Effect for 6 seconds. This effect does not stack. | | Champion of Light applies a cool-down of 60 / 50 / 40 seconds after blinding the Killer. "I squeezed the Flashlight like my life depended on it, willing it to stop coming any closer." — Departure
description_ar: بيرك Champion of Light يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Alan Wake. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 7.5.1 [ edit ] Buff: now applies Hindered when the Killer is blinded by any means, despite still requiring the Player to hold a Flashlight for the Perk to be active.

Patch 7.5.2 [ edit ] Quality of Life: removed the condition of holding a Flashlight for the Perk to be active in general, causing its primary effect to be active while shining a Flashlight and its secondary effect to apply regardless of whether the Player is holding a Flashlight or not. This change was motivated by the original Activation condition feeling too restrictive regarding the newly added secondary effect of the previous Patch.
Patch 9.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Cool-down duration from 80 / 70 / 60 seconds to 60 / 50 / 40 seconds.
Name Reference [ edit ] Champion of Light is a reference to the lyrics of the song of Alan Wake 2 titled Herald of Darkness, "Show me the champion of light! I'll show you the herald of darkness!".

name: Chemical Trap
official_description: "In the Fog, an officer must adapt to the materials at hand." After repairing Generators for a total of 20 %, Chemical Trap activates: Press the Active Ability button while near a dropped Pallet to install a Trap, which stays active for 40 / 50 / 60 seconds. | When the Killer breaks the Trapped Pallet, its Trap explodes, spraying the Killer with a chemical compound: Causes the Killer to suffer from a -50 % Hindered Status Effect for 4 seconds. | | Chemical Trap deactivates after triggering successfully or once the timer runs out. The Auras of Trapped Pallets are revealed to all Survivors in yellow. "How do we kill it, Ash?" — Ellen Ripley

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Repair Requirement from a variable 70 / 60 / 50 % to a fixed 20 %.
Nerf: reduced the duration a Trap stays active from 100 / 110 / 120 seconds to 40 / 50 / 60 seconds.

name: Clairvoyance
official_description: "There is an intrinsic energy in you that sees beyond your vision." After cleansing or blessing a Totem, Clairvoyance activates. While active, press and hold the Use Item button when empty-handed to unlock your full Aura-reading potential: The Auras of the following objects within 64 metres are revealed to you for as long as you uphold the interaction, up to a maximum of 10 / 11 / 12 seconds: Chests | Exit Gate Switches | Generators | Hatch | Hooks | | "Does anyone else see that? Just me?" — Mikaela Reid

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: can now also be activated by blessing a Totem, instead of just cleansing one.
Patch 8.5.0 [ edit ] Change: removed the Progress bar.
Patch 8.5.1 [ edit ] Reversal: re-added the Progress bar.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the maximum Aura-reading duration from 8 / 9 / 10 seconds to 10 / 11 / 12 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Clean Break
official_description: "At the end of the day, everyone has to look out for themselves." After completing a Healing action on another Survivor, Clean Break activates. Press the Active Ability button while being healed by another Survivor to trigger the following effects: Suffer from the Broken Status Effect. | You are automatically healed 1 Health State after 80 / 70 / 60 seconds. This effect is cancelled prematurely if you enter the Dying State. | | Clean Break does not activate if you already suffer from Broken. Clean Break deactivates after healing you. "I'll be fine! Don't stick your neck out for me." — Taurie Cain

name: Come and Get Me!
official_description: "You'll risk your life to save others." After unhooking a Survivor, while crouched and stationary, press the Active Ability button to trigger the following effects: Suppresses the creation of Grunts of Pain, Pools of Blood, and Scratch Marks for all injured or dying Survivors within 24 metres of your location for the next 10 / 12.5 / 15 seconds. | Causes you to scream and reveal your Aura to the Killer for 5 seconds. | "We're the ones who live." — Rick Grimes

name: Conviction
official_description: "Sometimes one last push means the difference between death and survival." After having completed a Healing action on another Survivor, whenever you are in the Dying State, Conviction activates. While active, press the Active Ability button after reaching at least 25 % Recovery progress to trigger the following effects: Unlocks the Self-Recovery ability, allowing you to fully recover from the Dying State. Inflicts the Broken Status Effect. | Causes you to automatically re-enter the Dying State after 20 / 25 / 30 seconds. | | "It's enough to keep going. Keep trying. Keep fighting. Keep dreaming." — Michonne Grimes
description_ar: بيرك Conviction يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Michonne Grimes. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.3.0 [ edit ] Nerf: Now specifically requires healing another Survivor to activate. This change was intended to prevent infinite looping when used together with Plot Twist.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Corrective Action
official_description: "You quickly analyse problems and correct others' work when they make a mistake." You start the Trial with 1 / 2 / 3 Token(s) and succeeding a Great Skill Check grants +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens. While any other Survivor performs a skilful interaction that can trigger Skill Checks, they benefit from the following effects: Converts any Failed Skill Check into a Good Skill Check. This consumes -1 Token. | | The Aura of that Survivor is revealed to you for 6 seconds. | Corrective Action does not apply to special Skill Checks. "Cannot hurt to have another set of eyes on the problem." — Jonah Vasquez

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: now temporarily reveals the Auras of Survivors who have a Failed Skill Check prevented.
Buff: now applies its effect to all Survivors within the Trial, instead of only to Survivors co-operating on the same action as you.
Change: updated the Perk icon to make the Skill Check icon behind Jonah much more prominent.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Counterforce
official_description: "You know how to withstand an enemy stronger than you, and it starts with hunting down and knocking out their support." You benefit from the following permanent effect: Increases the default value of your Cleansing speed to 125 %. | Whenever you cleanse a Totem, Counterforce triggers the following effects: Increases your Cleansing speed by a stack-able +25 %. | The Aura of the Totem farthest from your current location is revealed to you for 10 / 12 / 14 seconds. | "I don't mind a little detective work." — Jill Valentine

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the default value of the Cleansing speed from 120 % to 125 %.
Buff: increased the stack-able bonus to the Cleansing speed from +20 % to +25 %.
Buff: increased the Aura-reveal duration from 2 / 3 / 4 seconds to 10 / 12 / 14 seconds.

name: Cut Loose
official_description: "You get in enough trouble, you know how to get out of it." After performing a Rushed Vault action while being chased, Cut Loose activates for 4 / 5 / 6 seconds: Suppresses all noises related to the Rushed Vault action, including the Loud Noise Notification for the Killer. | While active, performing another Rushed Vault action resets the timer each time. Cut Loose has a cool-down of 45 seconds after use and the timer has elapsed. "I know how we can get out of here! Quick, this way!" — Thalita Lyra

name: Dance With Me
official_description: When performing a Rushed action to vault a Window or exit a Locker, Dance With Me triggers its effect: Suppresses the creation of your Scratch Marks for 5 seconds. | Dance With Me has a cool-down of 20 / 20 / 15 seconds. "Another show's off and runnin', Dance with me, cuz there's a storm a commin' Follow my boots, try to keep up, Dance with me, until sun up." — Kate Denson's "Dance with Me"

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: halved the Cool-down durations from 60 / 50 / 40 seconds to 30 / 25 / 20 seconds.
Patch 8.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the duration of the Suppression effect from 3 seconds to 5 seconds.
Buff: further reduced the Cool-down durations from 30 / 25 / 20 seconds to 25 / 20 / 15 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Dark Sense
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability. Whenever a Generator is completed, Dark Sense activates: The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 5 / 7 / 10 seconds once they come within 24 metres of your location. | Dark Sense deactivates after use. "Take it from an old-timer: Slow down, don't rush and try not to worry so much! The best way to beat him is to know how he thinks." — Murf, The Lost Tapes

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: now reveals the Aura of the Killer upon completing a Generator instead of powering the Exit Gates. Buff: increased the Aura-reveal duration from completing the last Generator (powering the Exit Gates was effectively the same condition) from 3 / 5 / 7 seconds to 5 / 7 / 10 seconds.
Buff: added a new effect that reveals the Aura for 5 seconds on completing any Generator that was not the last one.
Nerf: now only triggers when a Generator is completed by the Perk user (the pre-rework version did not care which Survivor completed the last Generator that powered the Exit Gates ).
Patch 3.2.0 [ edit ] Reversal: reverted the previous nerf, now allowing the Perk to trigger on any completed Generator, regardless of who repaired it.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: Buff: Dark Sense now waits until the Killer comes within a certain distance of you to reveal their Aura, making it a more useful warning tool.
Buff: now applies its extended Aura-reveal duration that was previously reserved for completing the last Generator to all completed Generators.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Dead Hard
official_description: "You can take a beating. Tap into your adrenaline bank to avoid taking further damage." After being unhooked by any means, Dead Hard activates:While injured and running, press the Active Ability button to trigger the following effect: Grants the Endurance Status Effect for 0.5 seconds. | Dead Hard cannot be used while Exhausted. Dead Hard causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60 / 50 / 40 seconds. "We were walkin' through t'ginnel one night when a beer bottle flew past me, then another, and another. I thought to myself "Gonna 'ave some fun 'ere lads, let's get stuck in!". It were a right dust up, I swear down!" — David King
description_ar: بيرك Dead Hard يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية David King. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.9.1 [ edit ] Quality of Life: adjusted the speed curve of Dead Hard to have it match the animation. This was step 1 of 2 steps to make the use of Dead Hard more visible to a Killer.
Patch 2.0.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: added a new animation to indicate that the Perk is active. This was step 2 of 2 steps to make the use of Dead Hard more visible to a Killer.
Quality of Life: removed the speed bonus while in the air. This change aims to fix a variety of game hostage issues in multiple Maps.
Patch 5.3.1 [ edit ] Quality of Life: added hit validation.

Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: reworked Dead Hard to remove the problematic aspect of gaining distance upon activation, which could not be countered by the Killer and removed skill as a factor from the Perk's use. Now, Dead Hard's sole intended use is to dodge hits by timing its activation correctly. Change: Dead Hard now triggers the Endurance Status Effect when activated.
Nerf: removed the forward dash.
Patch 6.2.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: adjusted the activation animation to fit the Endurance bonus duration.
Patch 6.7.0 [ edit ] Nerf: now requires that the Perk user is unhooked or unhooked themselves for it to activate and it deactivates after use, effectively limiting it to 2 uses per Trial.

name: Deadline
official_description: "Desperation creeps in, and you push yourself to work harder." Whenever you are in the Injured State, Deadline activates: Increases the Odds of triggering Skill Checks by 6 / 8 / 10 % while repairing or healing. Causes Skill Checks to appear in random places. | | Reduces the penalty for missed Skill Checks by -50 %. | "The night had been one desperate situation after another." — Departure

name: Deception
official_description: "Your adventurous lifestyle requires moments of crafty misdirection." Press and hold the Sprint button while interacting with a Locker for the following effects: Suppresses the creation of your Scratch Marks and Pools of Blood for 5 seconds. | Causes you to run past the targeted Locker, instead of entering it. | Causes its doors to swiftly open and close again, feining you having entered it in a rush. | Triggers a Loud Noise Notification for the Killer at its location. | Deception has a cool-down of 25 / 20 / 15 seconds.

Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of whichever 3 Generators are currently in closest proximity to one another are revealed to you. | Increases your Repair speed on those Generators by 4 / 5 / 6 %. |

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: now reveals a group of Generators closest in proximity to one another for a much longer duration, instead of randomly selected ones during the initial camera-pan upon loading in. Buff: modified the number of revealed Generators from a variable 1 / 1 / 2 Generator(s) to a fixed 3 Generators across all Tiers.
Buff: increased the Aura-reveal duration from 4 / 8 / 8 seconds to 30 / 45 / 60 seconds.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: the Perk user now repairs the highlighted Generators slightly faster.
Patch 7.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: Déjà Vu no longer has a timer and is now active indefinitely.
Buff: increased the Repair speed bonus on the revealed Generators from 3 / 4 / 5 % to 4 / 5 / 6 %.
Patch 9.1.0 [ edit ] Nerf: Generators revealed by Déjà Vu are no longer tracked by equipped Maps.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Deliverance
official_description: After safely unhooking another Survivor, Deliverance activates: Grants the ability to perform a successful Self-Unhook at any point during the first Hook Stage. | Causes the Broken Status Effect for 100 / 80 / 60 seconds after unhooking yourself. | Deliverance cannot be used during the second Hook Stage or if you are hooked as the Last Survivor Standing. Deliverance is disabled for the remainder of the Trial after use. "I was raised by a strict man who taught me how to make the best of a bad situation." — Adam Francis
description_ar: بيرك Deliverance يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Adam Francis. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Desperate Measures
official_description: "You refuse to fail, even during your darkest hour." Whenever any Survivor, including yourself, is not in the Healthy State, Desperate Measures activates: Increases your Action speeds for Healing and Unhooking by a stack-able 16 / 18 / 20 % per injured, dying, or hooked Survivor, up to a maximum of 64 / 72 / 80 %. | "When they come with a wrecking ball, build stronger walls." — Felix Richter

name: Detective's Hunch
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability. Whenever a Generator is completed, Detective's Hunch triggers its effect: The Auras of the following objects within 32 / 48 / 64 metres of your location are revealed to you for 20 seconds: Chests | Generators | Totems | | "Are you able to tell us where you were last night?" — Detective David Tapp

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 3.3.1 [ edit ] Buff: now also triggers on Generators completed by other Survivors.
Buff: doubled the Aura-reveal duration from 5 seconds to 10 seconds.
Patch 3.5.0 [ edit ] Indirect Quality of Life: equipped Maps can now also track Chests revealed by Detective's Hunch.
Patch 9.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: again doubled the Aura-reveal duration from 10 seconds to 20 seconds.
Nerf: equipped Maps no longer track any objects revealed by Detective's Hunch.

name: Distortion
official_description: Start the Trial with 1 Token. Whenever the Killer attempts to read your Aura, Distortion automatically consumes -1 Token to trigger the following effects for 8 / 10 / 12 seconds: Blocks your Aura from being read. | Suppresses the creation of your Scratch Marks. | Distortion recharges +1 Token every 15 seconds of being chased by the Killer, and can hold 2 Tokens. Distortion does not trigger its effects while in the Dying State.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.5.0 [ edit ] Change: updated the in-game description to reflect that it does not trigger when the Survivor is in the Dying State or caught in Killer Traps.

Patch 5.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the starting Tokens from 3 to 4. This change was motivated by the addition of numerous Aura-reading Unlockables since the original addition of this Perk, making it more likely that Tokens are used up quickly.
Patch 5.6.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: no longer loses Tokens when standing in the Area of Effect of another Unlockable that shields the Perk User's Aura from the Killer (i.e. Boon: Shadow Step ).
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: now has the ability to recharge Tokens. Buff: added a new effect that recharges a Token for every 30 seconds spent in the Killer's Terror Radius.
Quality of Life: now also works when caught in Killer Traps.
Quality of Life: added an audio cue for when a Token is used.
Reversal: reduced the starting Tokens from 4 to 3. This change compensates for the new ability to recharge Tokens.
Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Aura-shield duration from 6 / 8 / 10 seconds to 8 / 10 / 12 seconds.

name: Diversion
official_description: After staying in the Terror Radius without being chased for 30 / 25 / 20 seconds, Diversion activates. While active, press the Active Ability button while crouched and motionless to throw a pebble in the direction you are facing: Creates a distraction for the Killer at its landing location 20 metres away: Triggers a Loud Noise Notification. | Creates fake Scratch Marks. | | Diversion deactivates after use. "There's what is easy and then there's what is right. If you confuse the two, there's no telling what you become." — Adam Francis

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: added the effect of creating fake Scratch Marks at the location of where the pebble lands.
Patch 4.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: changed the distance of the Pebble-throw to be 20 metres across all Tiers.
Buff: reduced the Charge time from originally 45 seconds and made it a variable at 40 / 35 / 30 seconds per Tier.
Patch 8.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Charge time from 40 / 35 / 30 seconds to 30 / 25 / 20 seconds.

name: Do No Harm
official_description: "Helping those in need comes easily, no matter how dire things get." When healing another Survivor, depending on their accumulated Hook Stages, you benefit from the following effects: Increases your Altruistic Healing speed by 30 / 40 / 50 % per Hook Stage, up to a maximum of 60 / 80 / 100 %. | Increases the Progression bonus of Great Healing Skill Checks by +3 % per Hook Stage, up to a maximum of +6 %. | "Look at me. My name's Orela, and I'm gonna make sure you're all right." — Orela Rose

name: Down to the Last
official_description: As more of your friends fall to the Killer, you become shrouded in isolation and the Killer's Aura-reading abilities towards you are disrupted. Each time a Survivor other than yourself is killed or sacrificed, Down to the Last gains 1 Token, up to a maximum of 3 Tokens: Grants a stack-able radius of 20 / 22 / 24 metres per Token around you, up to a maximum of 60 / 66 / 72 metres, within which you are immune to the Killer's Aura-reading abilities. | When you are the Last Survivor Standing, you benefit from the following effects: Increases your Repair speed by +75 %. | Increases your Gate and Hatch Opening speeds by +50 %. | Increases your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by increasing the default value by +100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
description_ar: بيرك Down to the Last يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Undocumented Changes [ edit ] Change: Prior to its first Rework in Patch 2.1.0, Sole Survivor had multiple changes to its percentages that were undocumented in the Patch Notes.

Patch 2.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: instead of reducing the range of the Killer's Aura-reading abilities, Sole Survivor now disables the Killer's Aura reading altogether within a certain range around the Survivor that increases with the death or sacrifice of each Survivor for a maximum of 48 / 54 / 60 metres.
Patch 2.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the ranges by 4 metres across all Tiers, re-instating Sole Survivor' s former synergy with Object of Obsession at the time.
Patch 3.7.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: Sole Survivor immediately lights up as soon as it gains one Token.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: now grants additional effects when you are the last Survivor standing: Increases the speeds of repairing Generators, opening Exit Gates and opening the Hatch.

Patch 9.4.0 [ edit ] Change: following the departure of CHAPTER 2: The HALLOWEEN® Chapter from Dead by Daylight in January 2026, this Patch changes Sole Survivor depending on whether or not Players own the Chapter or not: For Players owning CHAPTER 2, the Perk remains unchanged as a Unique Perk belonging to Laurie Strode. This includes the original name, icon and flavour text.

For all other Players, the Perk is changed into a General Perk available to all Survivors, renaming it to Down to the Last and giving it a new icon, replacing Laurie's face with a generic survivor instead.

Calculations [ edit ] Generator Repair [ edit ] Generators require inputting 90 Charges at a default rate of 1 c/s in order to be completed. This does not include succeeding Great Skill Checks, which add bonus Progression. Repair speed Repair duration Default 1 c/s 90 seconds Down to the Last 1.75 c/s ~51.43 seconds Exit Gate Opening [ edit ] Exit Gates require inputting 20 Charges at a default rate of 1 c/s in order to be opened. Opening speed Opening duration Default 1 c/s 20 seconds Down to the Last 1.5 c/s ~13.33 seconds Hatch Opening [ edit ] The Hatch requires inputting 2.5 Charges at a default rate of 1 c/s in order to be opened. Opening speed Opening duration Default 1 c/s 2.5 seconds Down to the Last 1.5 c/s ~1.66 seconds <span class="mw-headline"

name: Dramaturgy
official_description: "When people bring you on to their project, they do so because of the unexpected magic you bring to your performance." Whenever you are at full health, Dramaturgy activates. While active, press the Active Ability button while running to run with knees high for 0.5 seconds before benefitting from the following primary effect: Grants a +25 Haste Status Effect for 2 seconds. | Afterwards, Dramaturgy triggers any one of the following secondary effects, but never the same one twice in a row: Grants a second instance of the primary Haste Status Effect. | Inflicts the Exposed Status Effect for 12 seconds. | Causes you to scream. | Grants a randomly selected Rare Item pre-equipped with a random selection of Add-ons. This causes you to automatically drop any previously held Item. | | Dramaturgy cannot be used while Exhausted. Dramaturgy causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60 / 50 / 40 seconds. "Take the part. It's a good movie, he says. What's the worst that can happen?" — Nicolas Cage

name: Duty of Care

While healthy, taking a Protection Hit causes all other Survivors within 12 metres of your location to benefit from the following effect: Grants them a +25 % Haste Status Effect for 4 / 5 / 6 seconds. | "Don't worry about me. I've got a knack for bouncing back." — Orela Rose

Buff: reduced the Cool-down duration from 40 / 35 / 30 seconds to 30 / 25 / 20 seconds.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.5.0 [ edit ] Rework: Buff: Great Skill Check token effect now permanently reduces the charges needed to repair a Generator instead of simply adding progress.
Nerf: added a maximum cap of Tokens this Perk can hold at once.
Patch 9.6.0 PTB [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the amount of permanent charges applied to the Generator from 2 to 1.
Patch 9.6.0 [ edit ] Nerf: tokens are now only granted to the Survivor who Unhooks an another Survivor.
Nerf: reduced tokens granted from 1 / 2 / 3 to 1.
Nerf: reduced maximum amount of tokens this perk can hold at once from 9 to 1 / 2 / 3.
Buff: increased the amount of permanent charges applied to the Generator from 1 to 5.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.5.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: now applies the Walking Speed bonus when injured.

Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Retired: with the departure of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things from Dead by Daylight, Fixated was reworked into a General Survivor Perk: Self-Aware. Rewrote the Lore text in the beginning of the description to be more generic.
For Players who had owned CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things before its removal, Self-Aware would still show the original flavour text in the description and the Character association with Nancy.
Patch 7.3.3 [ edit ] Reinstation: reinstated Fixated with the return of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things. Renamed Self-Aware back to Fixated.
Adjusted the Lore text back to that of Fixated.
Patch 7.4.0 [ edit ] Change: Fixated is now once again a Unique Perk.

official_description: "You risk life and injury for others." While healthy and healing another Survivor without using a Med-Kit, press the Active Ability button to trigger the following effects: Trade 1 Health State with the other Survivor: Instantly heals them to the Injured State, if they were dying or suffering from the Deep Wound Status Effect. | Instantly heals them to full health, if they were injured. | | You yourself become injured and suffer from the Broken Status Effect for 80 / 70 / 60 seconds. | You become the Killer's Obsession, if not already. | Reduces your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by reducing the default value by -100 %. name: Friendly Competition
official_description: "You revel in the community spirit of a competition, and inspire others to follow suit." Each time you complete a Generator together with at least one other Survivor, Friendly Competition activates: Increases the Repair speed of all participating Survivors, including yourself, by +5 % for 100 / 110 / 120 seconds. | "C'mon, let's do this!" — Thalita Lyra
description_ar: بيرك Friendly Competition يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Thalita Lyra. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Friendly Competition يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Thalita Lyra. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Effect duration from 45 / 60 / 75 seconds to 100 / 110 / 120 seconds.

name: Ghost Notes
official_description: "You know that the best breakdowns precede the biggest build-ups." While suffering from the Exhausted Status Effect, you benefit from the following effects: Causes your Scratch Marks to disappear +50 % faster. | Increases your Recovery rate from that Status Effect by 5 / 7.5 / 10 %. | Ghost Notes does not cause the Exhausted Status Effect. "Let's take it to the bridge!" — Vee Boonyasak
description_ar: بيرك Ghost Notes يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Vee Boonyasak. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Hardened
official_description: Live long enough, and survival will run in your blood. After unlocking a Chest and either blessing or cleansing a Totem, Hardened activates: Suppresses the urge to scream from any cause and instead causes the Aura of the Killer to be revealed to you for 3 / 4 / 5 seconds. | "Got to keep quiet. That thing is still out there." — Lara Croft
description_ar: بيرك Hardened يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Lara Croft. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Head On
official_description: "When your mind is set, there better be no one standing in your way." After hiding in a Locker for 3 seconds, Head On activates. While active, hold the Sprint button while exiting the Locker to trigger its effect: Causes you to forcefully launch yourself from the Locker, stunning the Killer if they are too close to it: Has a Stun range of 2.5 metres. | Has a Stun duration of 3 seconds. | | Triggers a Loud Noise Notification for the Killer upon missing. | Head On cannot be used while Exhausted. Head On causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60 / 50 / 40 seconds on a successful stun. "People are remembered for the challenges they overcome. You can run away and forget what you're capable of or you can face your fears and remind the world of who you are." — Jane Romero
description_ar: بيرك Head On يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Jane Romero. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 3.1.0 [ edit ] Nerf: added AFK Crows as a Deactivation condition. This means that if and for as long as the Survivor using Head On has accrued at least 1 AFK Crow, they are unable to trigger the Perk.
Patch 3.7.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life:added a timer to the Perk icon in order to make it clearer when it will be ready.
Patch 8.1.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: now correctly applies Overheat when stunning The Singularity in Overclock Mode.
Patch 9.0.0 [ edit ] Reversal: removed AFK Crows as a Deactivation condition. This change was likely a by-product of the AFK Crows Rework in the same Patch.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Hope
official_description: "The growing odds of a successful escape fill you with hope and give you wings." Once the Exit Gates are powered, Hope activates for the remainder of the Trial: Grants a 3 / 4 / 5 % Haste Status Effect. | "Buckle up, fuckos! Let's roll." — Nikki, The Lost Tapes
description_ar: بيرك Hope يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Movement Speed bonus from 2 / 3 / 4 % to 5 / 6 / 7 %.
Nerf: added a timer of 120 seconds.
Patch 1.5.0 [ edit ] Change: updated the Perk with the Haste Status Effect.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: removed the timer, once again allowing the Perk to be active for the remainder of the Trial.

Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Haste strength from 5 / 6 / 7 % to 3 / 4 / 5 %. This change was potentially motivated by the fact that at Tier III, it could previously make a Survivor virtually uncatchable for Killers with a base speed of 110 %, shrinking their speed difference to just 3 %.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Inner Focus
official_description: You have honed your ability to see through the haze of the Ravage. Grants the ability to see the Scratch Marks of other Survivors. | Whenever another Survivor loses a Health State due to the Killer, the Aura of the latter is revealed to your for 6 / 8 / 10 seconds. | "The death, the trauma, the fear... it all leads here. The Overlap." — Haddie Kaur, Ravages of the Abyss Episode 11
description_ar: بيرك Inner Focus يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Haddie Kaur. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: removed the range limit of being within 32 metres of another Survivor to see their Scratch Marks.
Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: doubled the Aura-reading duration from 3 / 4 / 5 seconds to 6 / 8 / 10 seconds.
Buff: removed the other range limit of being within 32 metres of another Survivor losing a Health State to see the Killer's Aura.
Patch 8.3.2 [ edit ] Nerf: now only triggers if the Survivor lost a Health State because of the Killer specifically.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Inner Strength
official_description: "You look inwards and trust your instincts when you feel lost and alone." After cleansing a Totem of any kind, Inner Strength activates. While active, hiding inside a Locker for 10 / 9 / 8 seconds triggers the following effect: Heals you to the next Health State. | Inner Strength deactivates after use. Inner Strength cannot be used while suffering from the Broken Status Effect. "All this time I've been trying so hard to pretend like everything's fine, but it's not." — Nancy Wheeler
description_ar: بيرك Inner Strength يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Nancy Wheeler. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Retired: with the departure of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things from Dead by Daylight, Inner Strength was reworked into a General Survivor Perk: Inner Healing This change also replaced the original icon, which showed Nancy, with a new one that showed a generic man.

For Players who had owned CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things before its removal, Inner Healing would still show the original icon with Nancy, the flavour text in the description, and the Character association with Nancy.

Patch 7.3.3 [ edit ] Reinstation: reinstated Inner Strength with the return of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things. Renamed Inner Healing back to Inner Strength and replaced the altered icon with its original one.
Patch 7.4.0 [ edit ] Change: Inner Strength is now once again a Unique Perk.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Invocation: Treacherous Crows
official_description: "One with arcane knowledge has no reason to fear those watchful birds." When in the Basement near the circle, press the Active Ability button to begin the Invocation, which takes 60 seconds to complete. During an Invocation, your Aura is revealed to all other Survivors and they can join in, accelerating the process by +100 %, if they too have an Invocation Perk equipped, or by +50 %, if they have not. Once the Invocation is completed, the following effects apply: Whenever the Killer scares a Crow while a Survivor is inside their Terror Radius, their Aura is revealed to all Survivors for 1 / 1.5 / 2 seconds. | You automatically enter the Injured State from any previous Health State, and suffer from the Broken Status Effect for the remainder of the Trial. | "Remember your training. They taught you all about the crows." — Taurie Cain
description_ar: بيرك Invocation: Treacherous Crows يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Taurie Cain. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
