name: Invocation: Weaving Spiders
official_description: "The place where fear festers and terror treads is also where those with the gift can reach across the veil." When in the Basement near the circle, press the Active Ability button to begin the Invocation, which takes 60 seconds to complete. During an Invocation, your Aura is revealed to all other Survivors and they can join in, accelerating the process by +100 %, if they too have an Invocation Perk equipped, or by +50 %, if they have not. Once the Invocation is completed, the following effects apply: Permanently reduces the Repair Charges requirement of all Generators in the Trial by 8 / 9 / 10 Charges. | You automatically enter the Injured State from any previous Health State, and suffer from the Broken Status Effect for the remainder of the Trial. | Completing this Invocation disables all other instances of Invocation: Weaving Spiders for the remainder of the Trial. "I call upon the spirits of the night, to aid us in our desperate flight!" — Sable
description_ar: بيرك Invocation: Weaving Spiders يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Sable Ward. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Invocation: Weaving Spiders يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Sable Ward. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: halved the duration of the Invocation process from 120 seconds to 60 seconds.
Buff: drastically reduced the Regression rate of an incomplete Invocation process upon interruption from -20 c/s to -1 c/s.
Patch 8.4.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: updated the in-game description for improved clarity and to match that of the new Invocation Perk.

Calculations [ edit ] By default, an Invocation requires 60 Charges to complete and has a default Action speed of +1 c/s. The table below shows how long the Invocation will take to complete assuming various combinations of Survivors with and without Invocation Perks participating, but does not cover all possible combinations in the scenarios listed, as that would create an overly complicated table: Calculations table Bonus Percentage Action Speed Completion Time Possible Scenario -50 % +0.5 c/s 120 seconds 1 other Survivor without an Invocation Perk This is a possible edge-case scenario in which the original Survivor started the Invocation "together" with another Survivor, but then immediately left the circle, leaving the other Survivor to continue the Invocation alone.
+0 % +1 c/s 60 seconds Original Survivor with Invocation: Weaving Spiders
+50 % +1.5 c/s 40 seconds Original Survivor with Invocation: Weaving Spiders
1 other Survivor without an Invocation Perk
+100 % +2 c/s 30 seconds Original Survivor with Invocation: Weaving Spiders

name: Iron Will
official_description: "You are able to concentrate and enter a meditative-like state to numb some pain." While injured, you benefit from the following effects: Reduces the volume of Grunts of Pain by 80 / 90 / 100 %. | Iron Will cannot be used while Exhausted, but does not cause the Status Effect.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: removed the condition of standing still for the Perk to apply its effect on Tiers I and II.
Nerf: reduced the Audio Level reduction from -100 % to -75 % on Tier II.
Patch 5.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: changed Iron Will to apply its effect as a multiplier, rather than them being additive.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Audio Level reductions from 50 / 75 / 100 % to 25 / 50 / 75 %.
Nerf: added the condition that the Perk is inactive when its user suffers from the Exhausted Status Effect, while not causing it itself.
Patch 8.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Audio Level reductions from 25 / 50 / 75 % to 80 / 90 / 100 %.

Patch 8.1.2 [ edit ] Reversal: reverted the previous buff from three years earlier, making Iron Will add its effect instead of multiplying it with others. This means that if Iron Will reduces the volume to 0 %, other Perks can raise it to reduced but audible levels again.

name: Kindred
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability. Whenever any Survivor is hooked, Kindred activates and applies the following effects: The Aura of the Killer is revealed to all Survivors whenever the Killer comes within 8 / 12 / 16 metres of the Hook. | If you are the Hooked Survivor, the Auras of all Survivors are revealed to each other. | If you are not the Hooked Survivor, the Auras of all other Survivors are only revealed to you. | "Be kind to one another, We're all in this together" — Sujan, The Lost Tapes
description_ar: بيرك Kindred يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Kindred يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: now reveals the Auras of all Survivors to all Survivors across all Tiers.
Buff: now reveals the Killer's Aura across all Tiers.
Buff: increased the Reveal distance of the Killer's Aura from a fixed 8 metres to a variable 8 / 12 / 16 metres.

Patch 3.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: added a tertiary effect that reveals the Auras of all Survivors only to the Perk User whenever they are not the Hooked Survivor, causing the Perk to now also activate when other Survivors are hooked.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Last Stand
official_description: "Even when things are at their worst, your spirit is indomitable." After staying in the Terror Radius without being chased for 120 / 105 / 90 seconds, Last Stand activates. While active, perform a Rushed Vault action to trigger its effect: Stuns the Killer for 3 seconds, if they are within 2.5 metres of that Vault location. | Last Stand is disabled for the remainder of the Trial after use. "Some bullies, you can live with. Others, you gotta fight." — Michonne Grimes
description_ar: بيرك Last Stand يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Michonne Grimes. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.

name: Leader
official_description: "You are able to organise a team to cooperate more efficiently." All other Survivors within 10 metres of your location benefit from the following effect: Increases their Action speeds for Cleansing, Gate-Opening, Healing, Sabotaging, Unhooking, and Unlocking by 20 / 25 / 30 %. This effect lingers for 15 seconds after leaving its Area of Effect. | | Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Leader at a time.
description_ar: بيرك Leader يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Dwight Fairfield. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: added a Linger effect.
Change: updated the in-game description to accurately list all additional Action speeds affected by Leader. Previously, some affected Action speeds were not mentioned.
Patch 2.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Action-Speed bonus from 3 / 6 / 9 % to 15 / 20 / 25 %.
Nerf: no longer affects Repair speeds.
Nerf: no longer stacks with other instances of itself. This nerf compensated for the greatly increased percentages in the same Patch.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: further increased the Action-Speed bonus from 15 / 20 / 25 % to 20 / 25 / 30 %.
Buff: increased the Area of Effect from 8 metres to 10 metres.
Change: updated the in-game description to simplify understanding the Linger effect.

name: Left Behind
official_description: "You will get the job done... no matter the cost." Once you are the Last Survivor Standing, Left Behind activates: The Aura of the Hatch is revealed to you within 24 / 28 / 32 metres. | "I'm not horse-shittin' around. I'm doing this alone!" — Bill Overbeck

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the stack-able Repair Speed bonus from 19 / 22 / 25 % to 55 / 65 / 75 %.
Patch 3.2.0 [ edit ] Rework: now reveals the Aura of the Hatch instead of boosting one's Repair speed.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Light-Footed
official_description: "Crossing paths with deadly Killers has taught you the value of discretion." Whenever you are healthy, Light-Footed activates: Suppresses the sound of your footsteps while running. | Light-Footed has a cool-down of 14 / 12 / 10 seconds after performing a Rush Vault action. "Come on, cat." — Ellen Ripley

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: halved the Cool-down duration from 28 / 24 / 20 seconds to 14 / 12 / 10 seconds.

name: Lightweight
official_description: Your running is light and soft, making your tracks harder to follow. Reduces the Lifetime of your Scratch Marks by 3 / 4 / 5 seconds. | Reduces the Spawn chance of patches of Scratch Marks by -60 %, making their spacing inconsistent. | "Take it slow, he knows where you have been... just like I have always said: 'live slow and die old'." — Dylan, The Lost Tapes

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Lifetime reduction from 1 / 2 / 3 second(s) to 3 / 4 / 5 seconds
Buff: added a secondary effect that reduces the Spawn chance of individual patches of Scratch Marks, making their spacing inconsistent.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Lithe
official_description: Whenever you perform a Rushed Vault action, Lithe triggers its effect: Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds. | Lithe cannot be used while Exhausted. Lithe causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60 / 50 / 40 seconds. "U mad?" — Feng Min

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: removed the additional Activation condition of being chased by the Killer while performing the Rushed Vault action. This condition was removed because it caused numerous instances of Lithe not activating properly when facing stealth Killers, which often caused the Chase condition to be initiated too late or ending too early, which made the Perk unreliable against them.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Lucky Break
official_description: "You have had your share of scrapes and bruises, but luck is always on your side." Whenever you are in the Injured State, Lucky Break activates: Suppresses the creation of Pools of Blood and Scratch Marks for up to 40 / 50 / 60 seconds. | Whenever you are healing another Survivor, Lucky Break recharges by the same amount of time spent performing the Healing action, up to its initial maximum. Lucky Break deactivates once its timer runs out or whenever your Health State updates to any other but the Injured State. "That's not enough to beat me. Not even close." — Yui Kimura
description_ar: بيرك Lucky Break يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Yui Kimura. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: now also suppresses the creation of Scratch Marks.
Nerf: reduced the maximum Timer duration from 120 / 150 / 180 seconds to 35 / 40 / 45 seconds.
Patch 5.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the effect duration from 35 / 40 / 45 seconds to 40 / 50 / 60 seconds.

Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: added the ability to recharge the Perk at a ratio of 1:1 while healing another Survivor (1 second of Healing = 1 second of use), up to the maximum Timer duration. This change was motivated by the effect usually running out rather quickly and leaving the Perk useless for large parts of the Trial.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Lucky Star
official_description: "You know how to stay calm in the face of incomprehensible danger." While hiding inside a Locker, you benefit from the following effect: Suppresses your Grunts of Pain. | After exiting the Locker you benefit from the following effects for 30 seconds: Suppresses your Grunts of Pain and the creation of Pools of Blood. | The Auras of all other Survivors are revealed to you. | The Aura of the nearest Generator is revealed to you and highlighted in yellow. | Lucky Star has a cool-down of 35 / 30 / 25 seconds. "You are my... lucky star..." — Ellen Ripley

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: copied the old primary effect to the secondary one, allowing it to suppress Grunts of Pain and Pools of Blood after exiting the Locker.
Buff: increased the effect duration from 10 seconds to 30 seconds.
Buff: removed the time limit from the primary effect, allowing it to suppress Grunts of Pain for as long as the Perk User hides inside the Locker.
Undocumented Nerf: moved the start of the cooldown from exiting the locker to end of effect duration.
Change: removed the suppression of Pools of Blood from the primary effect. This aspect of the Perk had no effect, however, due to Lockers suppressing the creation of Pools of Blood by default.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Cool-down duration from 40 / 35 / 30 seconds to 35 / 30 / 25 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Made for This
official_description: "You were born to survive, and raised to adapt." Whenever you are in the Injured State, Made for This activates. While active, completing a Healing action on another Survivor triggers the following primary effect: Grants the Endurance Status Effect for 6 / 8 / 10 seconds. Endurance is cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action of any kind. | | While active and suffering from the Deep Wound Status Effect, running triggers the following secondary effect: Grants a 1 / 2 / 3 % Haste Status Effect. | "I didn't come here to be robot food!" — Gabriel Soma

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 7.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: the Exhausted Status Effect no longer deactivates the Perk.
Nerf: added Deep Wound Status Effect as an Activation requirement for granting Haste.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Mettle of Man
official_description: "Evil has a way of always finding you." After triggering a third Protection Hit by any means, Mettle of Man activates: While in the Injured State, Mettle of Man shields you from the next attack that would put you into the Dying State. | After healing back to full health by any means, Mettle of Man reveals your Aura to the Killer whenever you are farther than 12 / 14 / 16 metres from their location. | Mettle of Man deactivates after entering the Dying State by any means. Increases your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by increasing the default value by +100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time. "Evil has a bullseye on my back the size of Tiger Stadium." — Ash Williams
description_ar: بيرك Mettle of Man يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Ash Williams. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Mettle of Man يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Ash Williams. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 3.0.0 [ edit ] Nerf: changed the Activation condition from Basic Attacks to triggering the Protection Hit Score Event instead. This change aimed to make it more difficult to activate the Perk, due to its powerful effect.
Patch 3.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: the Perk no longer becomes disabled after use, but rather just deactivated. This change allowed the Perk to be activated multiple times in a Trial, rather than just once.

Patch 6.1.2 [ edit ] Rework: reworked the Perk to actually use the Endurance Status Effect instead of just displaying its icon and made it easier to activate. Buff: reduced the Activation requirement from 3 to 2 Protection Hits.
Nerf: now reveals the Aura while the Perk is active, instead of after healing back to full health.
Patch 6.2.0 [ edit ] Reversal: reverted the previous changes. This reversal was motivated by an overwhelmingly negative community response to the new Perk, perceiving it as considerably weaker.

Quality of Life: no longer displays the icon of the Endurance Status Effect. This change acknowledges the fact that Mettle of Man never was a proper Endurance Perk, as it always displayed a unique behaviour.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Mirrored Illusion
official_description: A familiar spell made unfamiliar in this corrupted landscape. After repairing Generators for a total of 20 %, Mirrored Illusion activates: Press the Active Ability button when next to either a Chest, Exit Gate, Generator, or a Totem to spawn a Static Illusion that lasts for 40 / 50 / 60 seconds. | Mirrored Illusion deactivates after triggering successfully. "Just... stay there... perfect!" — Baermar
description_ar: بيرك Mirrored Illusion يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Aestri Yazar & Baermar Uraz. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Generator Repair Requirement from 50% to 20%.
Nerf: reduced the duration the Illusion stays active from 100 / 110 / 120 seconds to 40 / 50 / 60 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Moment of Glory
official_description: "A hero should always have the chance to make a comeback." After performing the Unlocking or Rummaging action on Chests a total of 2 times, Moment of Glory activates: When you become injured, you instantly suffer from the Broken Status Effect. | You are automatically healed 1 Health State after 80 / 70 / 60 seconds. This effect is cancelled prematurely if you enter the Dying State. | | Moment of Glory does not activate if you already suffer from the Broken Status Effect. Moment of Glory deactivates after healing you. "Never lose hope for a brighter tomorrow." — Trevor
description_ar: بيرك Moment of Glory يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Trevor Belmont. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: No Mither
official_description: "Go on out, kid, it is just a scratch. Your thick blood coagulates practically instantly." You suffer permanently from the Broken Status Effect in exchange for the following benefits: Suppresses the creation of Pools of Blood. | Suppresses your Grunts of Pain while in the Injured State or in the Dying State. | Unlocks the Self-Recovery ability, allowing you to fully recover from the Dying State: Increases the Recovery speed by 15 / 20 / 25 %. | | "I lost it. Just lamped him one. They went and banned me didn't they. Went t'pub afterwards, had a few pints and moved on to the next chapter. I couldn't be mithered with it all anyway, you know what I mean? Can't be arsed." — David King
description_ar: بيرك No Mither يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية David King. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.2.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: updated the Perk with the Broken Status Effect.
Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased Volume reduction for Grunts of Pain from 0 / 25 / 50 % to 25 / 50 / 75 %.
Buff: now also increases the Recovery speed.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: modified and increased the Volume reduction for Grunts of Pain from a variable 25 / 50 / 75 % to a fixed 100 % across all Tiers.

Incompatible Survivor Perks [ edit ] Some Perks don't function when run alongside No Mither, due to having either a requirement to be Healthy, granting the ability to self-heal, or having some other incompatibility with the Broken Status Effect. It is therefore not advised to combine No Mither with the following Perks. Perks that provide a benefit which is already granted by No Mither: Iron Will
Perks that don't function while Injured: Dramaturgy
Perks that don't function while Broken: Clean Break
Teamwork: Collective Stealth Can only be activated when healed from the Dying State.

name: No One Left Behind
official_description: "It is inconceivable to leave someone behind." Once the Exit Gates are powered, No One Left Behind activates: The Auras of all other Survivors are revealed to you. | Increases your Action speeds for Healing and Unhooking by 50 / 75 / 100 %. | Increases the strength and duration of the Haste Status Effect granted to Survivors you unhook by +10 % and +5 seconds respectively: Causes them to benefit from a 20 % Haste Status Effect for 15 seconds. | | "Yeah, no shit. But I believe we can outsmart and overthrow him if we work together. Don't be predictable and selfish!" — Clyde, The Lost Tapes
description_ar: بيرك No One Left Behind يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.0.2 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Action Speed bonuses from 5 / 10 / 15 % to 4 / 8 / 12 %.
Patch 3.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Action Speed bonuses from 4 / 8 / 12 % to 30 / 40 / 50 %.
Quality of Life: now reveals the Auras of all other Survivors.
Nerf: now triggers only an Exit Gate has been opened, rather than them just powering up.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: now increases the strength of the default Haste Status Effect a Survivor receives from being unhooked by +7 % and extends its duration by +5 seconds.
Reversal: reverted the nerf to the Activation condition.

Patch 6.2.0 [ edit ] Indirect Nerf: no longer extends the duration of the Haste Status Effect. This was because the default duration was increased to the resulting duration of 10 seconds in the same Patch.
Patch 8.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Action Speed bonuses from 30 / 40 / 50 % to 50 / 75 / 100 %.

name: Off the Record
official_description: "You have learnt that a quiet approach is sometimes best." After being unhooked or unhooking yourself, Off the Record activates for 30 / 35 / 40 seconds: Blocks your Aura from being revealed. | Suppresses your Grunts of Pain while in the Injured State. | Suppresses the creation of your Scratch Marks. | Grants the Endurance Status Effect. Endurance is cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action of any kind. | | Off the Record deactivates prematurely and is disabled for the remainder of the Trial upon powering the Exit Gates. "Trust me, I investigate thoroughly and discreetly." — Zarina Kassir
description_ar: بيرك Off the Record يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Zarina Kassir. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: Now also grants the Endurance Status Effect in addition to the previous effects.
Nerf: Added a new Deactivation condition that disables the Perk upon powering the Exit Gates.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Reversal: Removed the Deactivation condition again.
Buff: Now also suppresses the creation of Scratch Marks in addition to the previous effects.
Nerf: Removed the Endurance Status Effect.
Patch 9.2.2 [ edit ] Reversal: Re-added the Endurance Status Effect.
Nerf: Halved the Active duration of the Perk from 60 / 70 / 80 seconds to 30 / 35 / 40 seconds.
Patch 9.3.0 [ edit ] Reversal: Again removed the Endurance Status Effect.

name: One-Two-Three-Four!
official_description: "A steady beat makes for steady work." While standing and idle, press the Active Ability button to start a Performance: Lasts for up to 15 seconds. | Empowers Survivors within 16 metres of your location. | Triggers continuous Skill Checks. | After successfully completing the Performance, empowered Survivors performing Healing or Repairing actions benefit from the following effect for 90 seconds: Increases the chances of triggering Skill Checks by +20 %. | One-Two-Three-Four! has a cool-down of 110 / 100 / 90 seconds after cancelling or completing the Performance. "We are loud! We are heavy! WE ARE AXEKICK!" — Vee Boonyasak
description_ar: بيرك One-Two-Three-Four! يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Vee Boonyasak. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Open-Handed
official_description: "Strengthens the potential in your and your team's Aura-reading abilities." All Survivors benefit from the following permanent effect: Increases the radius of all Aura-reading abilities by 8 / 12 / 16 metres. | Open-Handed only affects Auras that emanate from the Survivor causing them. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Open-Handed at a time. "Paying attention is what kept me alive through the years. That, and my good looks of course." — Ace Visconti
description_ar: بيرك Open-Handed يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Ace Visconti. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Open-Handed يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Ace Visconti. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.5.2 [ edit ] Buff: now extends its effect to all Survivors present in the Trial and can stack its effect with other instances of Open-Handed.
Patch 4.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: doubled the effect from 4 / 6 / 8 metres to 8 / 12 / 16 metres.
Nerf: no longer stacks with other instances of Open-Handed. This nerf was added as a counter-measure to the doubled strength of Open-Handed's effect.

Rules [ edit ] Open-Handed is particular about the type of Aura-reading it will extend and follows two basic rules: Open-Handed only affects Aura-reading that has a finite range Example 1: Bond's Aura-reading is limited to 20 / 28 / 36 metres around the Survivor using it --> it has a finite range
Example 2: Aftercare's Aura-reading has no such limitation --> it has an infinite range
Open-Handed only affects Aura-reading whose source emanates from a Survivor Example: Kindred's Aura-reading on the Killer is based on the location of the hooked Survivor, not the Hook itself

Special Cases [ edit ] The following section lists Perks that Players commonly assume to work with Open-Handed, but actually do not, or vice versa: Boil-Over [ edit ] Boil Over is not affected by Open-Handed as it violates Rule #2: The ability to read the Aura of nearby Hooks emanates from the Killer, not from the carried Survivor.

Hex: No One Escapes Death [ edit ] Hex: No One Escapes Death is not affected by Open-Handed as it violates Rule #2: The ability to read the Aura of the Hex Totem emanates from the Hex Totem itself, not from a Survivor.

name: Overcome
official_description: "You have calculated how much energy you can risk to expend." Whenever you enter the Injured State from full health, Overcome triggers its effect: Extends the duration of the On-hit Sprint boost by +2 seconds. | Overcome cannot be used while Exhausted. Overcome causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60 / 50 / 40 seconds. "After careful analysis, we are getting the hell out of here!" — Jonah Vasquez
description_ar: بيرك Overcome يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Jonah Vasquez. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Overzealous
official_description: Fighting back against the Ravage motivates and inspires you. After cleansing or blessing a Totem, Overzealous activates: Dull Totem: Increases your Repair speed by 8 / 9 / 10 %. | Hex Totem: Increases your Repair speed by 16 / 18 / 20 %. | Overzealous deactivates after losing a Health State by any means. "The Ravage senses us. We need to work fast." — Haddie Kaur, Ravages of the Abyss Episode 9

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Repair speed bonus to 6 / 7 / 8 %.
Buff: the Repair speed bonus doubles if the cleansed Totem was a Hex Totem.
Patch 6.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Repair speed bonus to 8 / 9 / 10 %.
Buff: now activates if a Totem is either Cleansed or Blessed.

name: Parental Guidance
official_description: "You have inherited the ability to hear the dead — and now the dead warn you of danger." After stunning the Killer by any means, Parental Guidance triggers its effect: Suppresses your Grunts of Pain and the creation of Scratch Marks and Pools of Blood for 5 / 6 / 7 seconds. |

<span class="mw-headline"

name: Pharmacy
official_description: "You have a knack for finding medicine." While unlocking a Chest, you benefit from the following effects: Increases the Unlocking speed by 75 / 100 / 125 %. | Reduces the audible range of all noises related to the Unlocking interaction by -12 metres. | Guarantees an Emergency Med-Kit after completing the interaction. | "Adrenaline, it is going to keep us awake. I stole it from one of the Nurse's carts." — Quentin Smith

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: modified the Noise-Range reduction from a variable 0 / 4 / 8 metres to a fixed -8 metres.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: now guarantees an Emergency Med-Kit from all Chests, while active.
Nerf: now only applies any of its effects while in the Injured State.
Patch 8.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Action-Speed bonus from 40 / 60 / 80 % to 70 / 85 / 100 %.
Buff: doubled the Noise-Range reduction from -8 metres to -16 metres.
Reversal: reverted the nerf to the Activation condition.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: further increased the Action-Speed bonus from 70 / 85 / 100 % to 75 / 100 / 125 %.
Nerf: reduced the Noise-Range reduction from -16 metres to -12 metres.

name: Plot Twist
official_description: "Big moments are vital, but you know that sometimes an understated read can be just as powerful." Whenever you are in the Injured State, Plot Twist activates. While active, press the Active Ability button while crouching and stationary to trigger the following primary effects: Silently enter the Dying State without notifying the Killer. | Suppresses your Grunts of Pain and the creation of Pools of Blood. | Unlocks the Self-Recovery ability, allowing you to fully recover from the Dying State: Increases the Recovery speed by +25 %. | | After self-recovering from the Dying State, you benefit from the following secondary effects: Instantly heals you to full health. | Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 2 / 3 / 4 seconds. | Plot Twist is disabled after recovering by any means, but can be reactivated once more upon powering the Exit Gates. "I think you'll find this shooting location... captivating." — Pauline Stamper
description_ar: بيرك Plot Twist يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Nicolas Cage. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: now also increases the Recovery speed when used.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Plunderer's Instinct
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: The Auras of the following objects are revealed to you within 32 / 48 / 64 metres: Closed Chests located in the environment. | Items sitting inside opened Chests. | Items dropped in the environment. | | When unlocking or rummaging through Chests, you benefit from the following effect: Increases the chances of finding rarer Items by +50 %. | "The pioneers used to loot these babies for hours." — Aizeyu, The Lost Tapes

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: now increases the chance of finding rarer Items in Chests by 14 / 24 / 46 %.
Nerf: reduced the Aura-reveal distances from 16 / 32 / 64 metres to 16 / 24 / 32 metres.

Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Intended Buff: intended to modify the secondary effect from a variable 14 / 24 / 46 % to a fixed 46 % across all Tiers. However, this change was never applied to the Perk's code, despite the in-game description having been adjusted, resulting in the Perk continuing to apply its secondary effect based on its current Tier for years, until Patch 8.4.0 finally corrected it.
Patch 3.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: added the ability to read the Aura of dropped Items.
Quality of Life: now only reveals the Aura of unopened Chests to reduce visual clutter.
Patch 8.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: doubled the Aura-reveal distances from 16 / 24 / 32 metres to 32 / 48 / 64 metres.
Buff: modified and buffed the secondary effect from a variable 14 / 24 / 46 % to a fixed 50 % across all Tiers.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Poised
official_description: "Achieving goals boosts your confidence." Whenever a Generator is completed, Poised triggers its primary effect: Suppresses the creation of your Scratch Marks for 20 / 25 / 30 seconds. | Whenever you start repairing a Generator for the first time, Poised triggers its secondary effect: The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 8 seconds. | "Ok, stay calm. Don't overthink it and just keep moving forward: you got this." — Jane Romero

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the duration of the primary effect from 6 / 8 / 10 seconds to 10 / 12 / 14 seconds.
Buff: added a secondary effect that briefly reveals the Killer's Aura to the Perk User, whenever they start to repair a Generator for the first time.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: further increased the duration of the primary effect from 10 / 12 / 14 seconds to 20 / 25 / 30 seconds.
Buff: increased the duration of the secondary effect from 6 seconds to 8 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Potential Energy
official_description: "Your arcane abilities have adapted to The Entity's Realm after centuries of wandering, granting you unprecedented control over its many devices." While repairing a Generator, press the Active Ability button to Store Potential Energy: Repair Charges no longer progress the Generator and are instead converted into Tokens: Gain 1 Token for the equivalent of 1 % Progression, up to a maximum of 10 / 15 / 20 Tokens. | | Failed Repair Skill Checks incur a penalty depending on how many Tokens have been accumulated: Not at Token Limit: Reduces the number of accumulated Tokens by -20 %. | At Token Limit: Regresses the Generator by -10 %. | | Having accumulated at least 1 Token, press the Active Ability button again on the same or a different Generator to Release Potential Energy: Consumes all accumulated Tokens. | Instantly progresses that Generator by +1 % per Token. | Potential Energy deactivates after use or losing a Health State by any means, and will lose all accumulated Tokens in case of the latter. "When you look a layer deeper, you realise... everything is connected." — Vittorio Toscano

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Progress percentage equivalent to 1 Token from 1.5 % to 1 %.
Quality of Life: no longer requires a minimum Repair time before the Perk can be activated.

Change: modified the Token Limit from a fixed 20 Tokens across all Tiers to a variable 10 / 15 / 20 Tokens. This change was necessary to give the Perk a set of Tier-based values after the removal of the minimum Repair time, which used to be variable.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Power Struggle
official_description: "You have never given up and you are not about to start now." Whenever you are in the Dying State, you benefit from the following primary effect: The Auras of upright Pallets are revealed to you. | After reaching 25 / 20 / 15 % of Wiggle progression, Power Struggle unlocks the following secondary effect: Grants the ability to drop a nearby Pallet while being carried by the Killer. Stuns the Killer and causes them to release you from their grasp. | | Power Struggle deactivates after use. "I relied on others to protect me once and I lost everything. Never again." — Élodie Rakoto

Quality of Life: now reveals the Auras of upright Pallets while in the Dying State.
<span class="mw-headline"

Projects an invisible cone in the direction you are looking, with a Detection angle of 45 ° and a range of 36 metres: Triggers an audio cue when detecting the Killer within it. | Premonition has a cool-down of 60 / 45 / 30 seconds. "I have a bad feeling about this!"

Audio Cue [ edit ] The following audio cue plays whenever Premonition detects the Killer: <span class="mw-headline"

name: Prove Thyself
official_description: Increases the Repair speed by a stack-able 6 / 8 / 10 % per other Survivor within 4 metres of your location, up to a maximum of 18 / 24 / 30 %. Prove Thyself extends its effect to all Survivors within its range. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Prove Thyself at a time. "Show me what you can do!" — Dwight Fairfield

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.5.0 [ edit ] Rework: reworked the main effect to be focused on Repair speed. Buff: changed the variable Repair Speed bonus to a fixed but stack-able +10 %.
Quality of Life: clarified that Prove Thyself is a Single Instance Perk.
Nerf: no longer affects the Action speeds for Cleansing, Healing, Opening, Sabotaging, and Searching.
Change: now grants bonus Bloodpoints for triggering co-operative Score Events.

Patch 3.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Repair Speed bonus from +10 % to +15 %. This change was motivated by an increase to the base Efficiency Penalty for multiple Survivors repairing the same Generator that was applied in the same Patch.
Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Repair Speed bonus and changed it from a fixed +15 % to a variable 6 / 8 / 10 %.
Change: no longer grants bonus Bloodpoints for triggering co-operative Score Events.

Calculations [ edit ] Note: Repair speed is measured in Charges per second. A Generator requires 90 Charges to be completed. Formula: 'Generator Charges' / (('Individual Default Repair speed' * (1 + 'Prove Thyself Bonus converted to decimal')) * 'Number of Repairing Survivors') Example for 2 Survivors: 90 / ((0.85 * (1 + 0.10)) * 2) = ~48.13 90 / ((0.85 * 1.10) * 2) = ~48.13 90 / (0.9350 * 2) = ~48.13 90 / 1.870 = ~48.13

name: Quick & Quiet
official_description: "You do not make as much noise as others when quickly vaulting over obstacles or hiding in Lockers." When performing a Rushed action to vault across Pallets or Windows, or to enter or exit Lockers, Quick & Quiet triggers its effect: Suppresses all noises related to those interactions and the accompanying Loud Noise Notification. | Quick & Quiet has a cool-down of 25 / 20 / 15 seconds. "They will never catch me!" — Meg Thomas
description_ar: بيرك Quick & Quiet يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Meg Thomas. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Quick & Quiet يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Meg Thomas. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.5.2 [ edit ] Rework: now reduces the audio levels of those interactions rather than reducing the range in which they can be heard by other Players. Buff: now fully suppresses all noises related to rushing the affected interactions.
Buff: now also suppresses the accompanying Loud Noise Notification.
Nerf: added a cool-down of 30 / 25 / 20 seconds. This change balances the improved effectiveness of the Perk.
Patch 8.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Cool-down duration from 30 / 25 / 20 seconds to 25 / 20 / 15 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Quick Gambit
official_description: "When you have the Killer's attention, you know how to keep it; others can be confident they will not be interrupted any time soon." While being chased by the Killer, the following effects apply: The Auras of other Survivors are revealed to you. | Increases the Repair speed of other Survivors by 3 / 4 / 5 %. | Quick Gambit has a cool-down of 40 seconds upon losing a Health State. "We need not resort to violence. And I shall prove it." — Vittorio Toscano
description_ar: بيرك Quick Gambit يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Vittorio Toscano. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 7.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Effect range from 24 metres to 36 metres.
Buff: now also reveals the Auras of any Generators inside the Effect range that can be affected by Quick Gambit.

Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Rework: reworked from keeping chases near Generators with a range limit to preferably keeping them away without one, at the cost of a long cool-down upon losing a Health State. Buff: removed the limit to the Effect range, making it apply map-wide.

Buff: replaced the Aura-reading ability of revealing Generators with revealing the other Survivors instead. This change allows the Perk User to keep the Killer away from the latter and the former would no longer serve a purpose with the removal of the range limit.
Nerf: reduced the Repair Speed bonus from 6 / 7 / 8 % to 3 / 4 / 5 %. This change compensates for the effect now applying map-wide.

Nerf: now has a cool-down of 60 seconds upon losing a Health State. This change balances out that Quick Gambit no longer has a range limit, making it more challenging to keep it active with a long chase and giving the Killer a way to play around it.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: reduced the Cool-down duration from 60 seconds to 40 seconds.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Rapid Response
official_description: "When the moment comes, you give it your all. Your survival depends on it." Whenever you become afflicted by the Exhausted Status Effect, Rapid Response triggers its effect: The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 2 seconds. | Perform a Rushed action to exit a Locker to voluntarily trigger the Status Effect for 30 / 25 / 20 seconds. Rapid Response cannot be used to override an existing Exhausted Status Effect. "All right. You got this. 3... 2... 1... go!" — Orela Rose

name: Red Herring
official_description: "You have noticed that people pay attention to whatever makes the loudest noise." After repairing a Generator for at least 1 second, Red Herring triggers its primary effect: The Aura of that Generator is highlighted to you in yellow. | The highlight persists until either of the following occurs: The Generator is completed. | You start repairing a different Generator. | You enter a Locker. | | When entering a Locker, Red Herring triggers its secondary effect: Triggers a Loud Noise Notification for the Killer on the highlighted Generator. | Red Herring has a cool-down of 25 / 20 / 15 seconds. "The news edit out what is burdensome and complex. which is the truth." — Zarina Kassir

official_description: You are accustomed to being hunted by malicious forces, and you have begun using it to your advantage. After repairing Generators for a total of 55 / 50 / 45 seconds, Repressed Alliance activates: Press the Active Ability button to call upon The Entity to block the Generator you are currently repairing for 30 seconds, after which Repressed Alliance deactivates. | The Aura of the blocked Generator is revealed to all Survivors in white. | Repressed Alliance can only be triggered when no other Survivors are repairing your Generator.

name: Road Life
official_description: "Faulty amps, sweaty dives, broken-down vans... nothing makes you feel more alive." While injured and repairing a Generator, regular Skill Checks have the following effects: Gain +1 Token for Great Repair Skill Checks. | Gain 0 Tokens for Good Repair Skill Checks. | Lose -1 Token for Failed Repair Skill Checks. | Once you accumulate 6 / 5 / 4 Tokens, consume all Tokens to benefit from the following effect: Increases your Healing speed by +100 % until you stop healing. | Road Life deactivates after use and does not activate while suffering from the Broken Status Effect. Road Life does not interact with special Skill Checks triggered by outside effects. "Remind me to teach you how to patch your own pedals, Krit." — Vee Boonyasak

name: Saboteur
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability: While the Killer is carrying another Survivor, the Auras of all Hooks within 56 metres of their original Pick-up location are revealed to you: The Auras of normal Hooks are white. | The Auras of Scourge Hooks are yellow. | | Unlocks the ability to sabotage Hooks without Toolboxes: Increases the Sabotage speed without a Toolbox by +30 %. This effect has a cool-down of 70 / 65 / 60 seconds after use. | |
description_ar: بيرك Saboteur يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Jake Park. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Saboteur يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Jake Park. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.0.2 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Sabotage speed without Toolboxes from 40 / 60 / 80 % of its default value to 30 / 40 / 50 % of its default value.
Patch 1.8.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: reduced the default chance of triggering Sabotage Skill Checks from 15 % to 10.5 %.
Patch 2.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: now increases the Auto-Repair timer of sabotaged Hooks and Bear Traps.
Buff: modified the Sabotage speed from a variable 30 / 40 / 50 % of its default value to a fixed 50 % of its default value across all Tiers.
Quality of Life: removed the negative effect of reducing the Success Zones of Sabotage Skill Checks.

Change: removed the positive effect of increases the efficiency of Toolboxes during Sabotage. This change was motivated by a general change to Toolboxes that removed the Efficiency penalty when using them for Sabotage.
Patch 3.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: now reveals the Aura of all Hooks within in a given radius around the carried Survivor's Pick-up location to the Perk user.
Buff: instead of slowing the Sabotage speed to 50 % of its default it, it now increases it by +20 %, resulting in a Sabotage duration of 2.5 seconds without Toolboxes.

name: Scavenger
official_description: "Where others see junk, you see valuable improvised tools." While holding a depleted Toolbox, Scavenger activates: Succeeding at Great Repairing Skill Checks grants 1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens. | Reaching the maximum number of Tokens automatically consumes them and fully recharges the Toolbox. | Recharging a Toolbox will reduce your Repair speed by -50 % for the next 40 / 35 / 30 seconds. | Scavenger grants the ability to rummage through an opened Chest once per Trial and will guarantee a basic Toolbox. "It's amazing what people will throw away around here." — Gabriel Soma
description_ar: بيرك Scavenger يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Gabriel Soma. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 7.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: Scavenger is no longer disabled for the rest of the Trial when activated, allowing for multiple uses.
Nerf: changed the number of Tokens to activate from a variable 6 / 5 / 4 Tokens to a fixed 5 Tokens.
Nerf: now inflicts a -50 % Repair Speed penalty for 40 / 35 / 30 seconds when activated.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Scene Partner
official_description: "You lock in with your co-star, engaging with and reacting to each other on a higher level." Whenever you are inside the Terror Radius, Scene Partner activates: Looking at the Killer causes you to scream, which reveals their Aura for 4 / 5 / 6 seconds. | There is a chance of 50 % that you will scream again, extending the Aura-reveal duration by another +2 seconds. | Scene Partner has a cool-down of 40 seconds. "This is not in the script!" — Nicolas Cage

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.4.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the base Aura-reveal duration from 3 / 4 / 5 seconds to 4 / 5 / 6 seconds.
Buff: reduced the Cool-down duration from 60 seconds to 40 seconds.

name: Second Wind
official_description: "You have learnt to avoid awkward situations with parents. Part of you still thinks your best option is to run away and hope things will take care of themselves." When you heal another Survivor for the equivalent of 1 Health State, Second Wind activates: The next time you are unhooked or unhook yourself, you suffer from the Broken Status Effect until Second Wind deactivates. | You are automatically healed 1 Health State after 28 / 24 / 20 seconds. | While Second Wind is active, the following conditions will deactivate it: Successfully being healed by Second Wind. | Being put into the Dying State before the timer elapses. | Second Wind does not activate if you already suffer from the Broken Status Effect. "Yeah, that's a no." — Steve Harrington
description_ar: بيرك Second Wind يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Steve Harrington. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: Reduced the Healing timer from 34 / 32 / 30 seconds to 28 / 24 / 20 seconds.

Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Retired: With the departure of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things from Dead by Daylight, Second Wind was reworked into a General Survivor Perk: Renewal. Removed the Lore text in the beginning of the description to be more generic.

This change also replaced the original icon, which showed Steve, with a new one that showed a generic woman. For Players who had owned CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things before its removal, Renewal would still show the original icon with Steve, the flavour text in the description, and the Character association with Steve.
Patch 7.3.3 [ edit ] Reinstation: Reinstated Second Wind with the return of CHAPTER 13: Stranger Things. Renamed Renewal back to Second Wind and replaced the altered icon with its original one.
Re-added the Lore text of Second Wind.
Patch 7.4.0 [ edit ] Change: Second Wind is now once again a Unique Perk.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Self-Care
official_description: Unlocks the Self-Care ability: Grants the ability to self-heal without needing a Med-Kit at 25 / 30 / 35 % of the regular Healing speed. |
description_ar: بيرك Self-Care يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Claudette Morel. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.0.2 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Self-Heal Healing speeds from 40 / 60 / 80 % to 30 / 40 / 50 %.
Patch 1.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: no longer affects the size of Healing Skill Checks Success zones.
Buff: increased and modified the Self-Heal Healing speeds from a variable 30 / 40 / 50 % to a fixed 50 % across all Tiers.
Nerf: reduced the Efficiency bonus towards using Med-Kits for Personal Healing from 50 / 75 / 100 % to 10 / 15 / 20 %.
Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Nerf: further reduced the Self-Heal Healing speeds from 30 / 40 / 50 % to 25 / 30 / 35 %.
Nerf: no longer improves the Item Efficiency of Med-Kits used for Personal Healing.

Calculations [ edit ] Self-Care functions by reducing the default Healing speed ( 1 c/s ) to 0.25 / 0.3 / 0.35 c/s. In code, and important for stacking with other effects, this is achieved by reducing the default Healing speed by -0.75 / -0.7 / -0.65 c/s: Health State Default Healing Speed Healing Speed penalty Resulting Healing speed Resulting Healing time Default 16 Charges 1 c/s - 1 c/s 16 seconds Tier I -0.75 c/s 0.25 c/s 64 seconds Tier II -0.7 c/s 0.3 c/s ~53.333 seconds Tier III -0.65 c/s 0.35 c/s ~45.714 seconds <span class="mw-headline"

name: Self-Preservation
official_description: "Life is unforgiving. The more confirmation you get of that, the more prepared you become." Whenever another Survivor is hooked, Self-Preservation triggers its effect: Grants the Elusive Status Effect for 20 / 25 / 30 seconds | "Something I learnt in the industry: when the axe is swinging, keep your head down." — Yun-Jin Lee

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.5.0 [ edit ] Rework: now applies Elusive when an another Survivor is hooked.
Change: updated the Perk's icon to reflect the new effect.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Shoulder the Burden
official_description: "Born to be a disciple. Ready to submit to a greater cause. This is your calling." Once per Trial, and while you are not on Death Hook, press the Active Ability button while standing in front of a Hooked Survivor to unhook them and trigger the following effects: Trade 1 Hook Stage with the other Survivor to their benefit. | Causes you to scream and suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 60 / 50 / 40 seconds. | "It's not your time yet. Now go on!" — Taurie Cain

<span class="mw-headline"

name: Slippery Meat
official_description: You have developed an efficient way to get off Hooks. Grants the ability to attempt +3 additional Self-Unhooks during the first Hook Stage. | Increases the chances to successfully perform a Self-Unhook by 2 / 3 / 4 %. |
description_ar: بيرك Slippery Meat يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.7.0 [ edit ] Rework: Buff: added a new primary effect that now grants additional attempts at performing a Self-Unhook.
Nerf: removed the previous primary effect that affect the default chances of performing a Self-Unhook.
Nerf: removed the tertiary effect that increased the Action speeds for performing either interaction.
Buff: increased the values of the secondary effect from 0 / 5 / 10 % to 15 / 20 / 25 %
Patch 2.6.2 [ edit ] Buff: increased the values of the primary effect and modified them from a variable 1 / 2 / 3 to a fixed +3 across all Tiers.
Patch 4.3.0 [ edit ] Rework: Buff: added a new secondary effect that now increases the default chances of performing a Self-Unhook.

Nerf: removed the previous secondary effect that affected the default chances of escaping from a Bear Trap. This change was motivated by a change in philosophy, with Perks no longer supposed to have effects that only target a specific Killer Power ( Bear Traps are unique to The Trapper ).
Change: updated the icon from featuring a Bear Trap to a Hook, reflecting the fact that the Perk no longer affects the former in any way.

name: Small Game
official_description: "You have the undeniable capability to sense danger." Projects an invisible cone in the direction you are looking, with a Detection angle of 45 ° and a range of 8 / 10 / 12 metres: Triggers an audio cue when detecting any type of Totem within it. This effect has a cool-down of 14 / 12 / 10 seconds after use. | | Each time a Totem is cleansed, Small Game gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens: Reduces the Detection angle of the cone by a stack-able -5 ° per Token, up to a maximum of -25 °. | "Nope." — Andy, The Lost Tapes
description_ar: بيرك Small Game يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.3.0 [ edit ] Rework: now provides an audio cue when detecting certain objectives within its Detection cone, rather than revealing Auras. Buff: added the ability to detect Totems and Phantasm Traps.
Nerf: added a cool-down of 15 / 12 / 10 seconds after trigger an audio cue.
This rework was motivated by the Perk previously having been useless in any Trial that did not feature The Trapper.
Patch 3.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: added the ability to detect Dream Pallets.

Patch 4.7.0 [ edit ] Rework: reworked to focus solely on detecting Totems and added a Token counter that keeps track of the amount of time a Totem was cleansed in the Trial. Buff: added a secondary effect that causes the angle of the Detection cone to narrow with each Token, making the Perk more precise over time.
Quality of Life: no longer triggers on the Totem the Player is currently interacting with.
Change: updated the icon to match the new effect.
Audio Cue [ edit ] Whenever a Totem is detected within Small Game's Detection cone, this sound cue will play: <span class="mw-headline"

name: Smash Hit
official_description: "When your rival makes a mistake, you seize the opportunity." Whenever you stun the Killer with a Pallet, Smash Hit triggers its effect: Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 4 seconds. | Smash Hit cannot be used while Exhausted. Smash Hit causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 30 / 25 / 20 seconds. "I have dealt with psychopaths in suits. You're just uglier and worse dressed." — Yun-Jin Lee

name: Soul Guard
official_description: "You have been through immense hardship and you are stronger for it." Whenever you heal or recover from the Dying State, Soul Guard triggers its primary effect: Grants the Endurance Status Effect for 4 / 6 / 8 seconds. Endurance is cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action of any kind. | This ability has a cool-down of 30 seconds. | | While suffering from the Cursed Status Effect, Soul Guard applies its secondary effect: Unlocks the Self-Recovery ability, allowing you to fully recover from the Dying State.. |

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 4.7.0 [ edit ] Nerf: added a cool-down of 30 seconds to the primary effect. This nerf was motivated solely by numerous Players at the time equipping Soul Guard alongside We're Gonna Live Forever and We'll Make It, which could create situations of nearly invincible Survivors that the Killer was unable to down faster than they could get back up.

name: Specialist
official_description: Adventure. Exploration. Excavation. You are in your element. Whenever you unlock or rummage through a Chest, Specialist gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 6 Tokens: Succeeding a Great Repair Skill Check while repairing a Generator consumes all Tokens. | Permanently reduces the Repair Charges requirement of that Generator by 2 / 3 / 4 Charges per Token, up to a maximum of 12 / 18 / 24 Charges. | "Well, then. Doesn't this feel familiar?" — Lara Croft

name: Spine Chill
official_description: An unnatural tingle warns you of impending doom. Whenever the Killer is within 36 metres of your location and looking at you with a clear Line of Sight, Spine Chill activates: Warns of the Killer's proximity and their potential awareness of your location by lighting its icon. | Increases your Action speeds for Blessing, Cleansing, Gate-Opening, Healing, Repairing, Sabotaging, Unhooking, and Unlocking by 2 / 4 / 6 %. This effect lingers for 0.5 seconds after the Killer loses Line of Sight or exits the Activation range. | | "There is a voice that doesn't use words. Listen.." — Sassy, The Lost Tapes
description_ar: بيرك Spine Chill يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.6.2 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Activation range from a variable 12 / 24 / 36 metres to a fixed 36 metres.
Patch 3.3.0 [ edit ] Indirect Buff: now also activates if the Killer is cloaked by the Undetectable Status Effect.

Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: replaced the Skill Check modifiers with an accessibility mechanic that indicates the intensity of the Killer's Terror Radius on the Perk's icon. This change was motivated by complaints from the hard-of-hearing regarding the 6.1.0 PTB version of Spine Chill. Since they had relied on the original version of Spine Chill as a replacement for being unable to hear the Terror Radius. This change was temporary and ultimately removed from Spine Chill, once the Visual Terror Radius was implemented.
Quality of Life: added a brief Linger effect to stop the icon from flickering and to make the Action Speed bonus more consistent.
Nerf: the Action Speed bonus now only activates if the Killer has direct Line of Sight to the Perk User. Previous, it sufficed if the Killer faced in their direction, including through walls.
Nerf: no longer affects the Vaulting speed, as the Developers decided that it did not fit the theme of the Perk.
Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] Reversal: removed the temporary Terror Radius indicator. Visual Terror Radius was added as an accessibility option in Patch 6.7.0.
Nerf: now only activates if the Killer is both within range and has clear Line of Sight.

name: Sprint Burst
official_description: Starting to run triggers Sprint Burst: Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds. | Sprint Burst cannot be used while Exhausted. Sprint Burst causes the Exhausted Status Effect for 60 / 50 / 40 seconds. "See you if you can catch up..." — Meg Thomas
description_ar: بيرك Sprint Burst يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Meg Thomas. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.0.2 [ edit ] Nerf: Increased the Cool-down durations from 40 / 30 / 20 seconds to 60 / 50 / 40 seconds.
Patch 1.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: Crouching now boosts the Recovery rate of the Cool-down by +33 %.
Nerf: Running now slows the Recovery rate of the Cool-down by -50 %.
Patch 1.4.2 [ edit ] Quality of Life: Can no longer be activated while in the Dying State. This was considered a waste of the Perk's effect at the time.

Patch 1.5.0 [ edit ] Nerf: Updated the Perk with the Exhausted Status Effect. This is considered a nerf as that Status Effect was specifically designed to stop Players from stacking Sprint Burst together with other sprint-boosting Perks (now known as Exhaustion Perks ).
Patch 2.1.0 [ edit ] Indirect Nerf: Running no longer allows the (slowed) Recovery of Exhausted Status Effect.
Patch 7.3.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: No longer accidentally triggers alongside Background Player, when the latter's Activation conditions are met.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Stake Out
official_description: "Getting close to the Killer fills you with determination." Staying in the Terror Radius without being chased grants +1 Token every 15 seconds, up to a maximum of 2 / 3 / 4 Tokens. While performing a skilful interaction that can trigger Skill Checks, you benefit from the following effects: Converts any Good Skill Check into a Great Skill Check. This consumes -1 Token. | | Increases the Progression bonus of those Great Skill Checks by +1 %. | Stake Out does not apply to regular Great Skill Checks nor do they consume any Tokens. "I had you, I had you on your knees. You're runnin' scared because we had you. We're gonna close this case!" — Detective David Tapp

Patch 3.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: added a new secondary effect that increases the Progression bonus of Converted Great Skill Checks.

name: Still Sight

"Breathe in. Breathe out. Now open your eyes." — Baermar

Unknown Patch [ edit ] Quality of Life: other Survivors now see a timer on the Perk Effect icon, indicating the remaining linger duration after leaving the range of Streetwise.

name: Teamwork: Collective Stealth
official_description: "When someone helps you out, you respond in kind." Whenever another Survivor finishes healing you, Teamwork: Collective Stealth activates, and both you and the Survivor who healed you benefit from the following effect: Suppresses your Scratch Marks for as long as you stay within 8 / 12 / 16 metres of one another. This effect lingers for 4 seconds once out of range and resumes upon re-entering it before that timer elapses. | | Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Teamwork: Collective Stealth at a time. "I'm good, I'm good... but keep it down." — Renato Lyra
description_ar: بيرك Teamwork: Collective Stealth يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Renato Lyra. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Teamwork: Collective Stealth يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Renato Lyra. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 8.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: added a Linger effect that allows either Survivor to leave the effect range for a few seconds and maintain the effect upon re-entering before the timer elapses.
Buff: modified the effect range from a fixed 12 metres to a variable 8 / 12 / 16 metres.
Buff: removed the Cool-down.
Buff: no longer deactivates when either Survivor loses a Health State.

name: Teamwork: Power of Two
official_description: "It is hard to keep up with you, but it does not stop people from trying." Whenever you finish healing another Survivor, Teamwork: Power of Two activates, and both you and the healed Survivor benefit from the following effect: Grants a +5 % Haste Status Effect for as long as you stay within 8 / 12 / 16 metres of one another. This effect lingers for 4 seconds once out of range and resumes upon re-entering it before that timer elapses. | | Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Teamwork: Power of Two at a time. "You good? Then keep up!" — Thalita Lyra
description_ar: بيرك Teamwork: Power of Two يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Thalita Lyra. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Teamwork: Throw Down
official_description: "You know the best way to even the odds is to empower those around you." Whenever you blind the Killer by any means or stun them using a Pallet, Teamwork: Throw Down triggers its effect: Grants the Endurance Status Effect to all other injured Survivors within 24 metres of your location for 6 / 8 / 10 seconds. | "Facing evil brings good people together." — Michonne Grimes

name: Teamwork: Toughen Up
official_description: "You maintain your composure under immense amounts of pain." While injured, whenever another Survivor within 24 metres of your location blinds the Killer by any means or stuns them using a Pallet, Teamwork: Toughen Up triggers its effect: Suppresses your Grunts of Pain, and the creation of Pools of Blood and Scratch Marks for 20 / 25 / 30 seconds. | "They're fucking with the wrong people." — Rick Grimes

name: Technician
official_description: "You are apt at handling machinery with the greatest care and precision." While repairing a Generator, the following effects apply: Reduces the audible range of all noises related to the Repair interaction by -8 metres. | Increases the Progression penalty incurred when failing a Skill Check by 5 / 4 / 3 %. | Suppresses the explosion of the Generator and the Loud Noise Notification usually triggered by that. | "I am gonna stealth this one." — Feng Min

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: modified the effect of reducing the audible range of Repair noises from a variable 0 / 4 / 8 metres to a fixed -8 metres across all Tiers.
Patch 4.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the effect of suppressing an explosion on Failed Repair Skill Checks from a variable chance of 30 / 40 / 50 % to a fixed chance of 100 % across all Tiers.
Nerf: added a penalty which increases the default Progression penalty incurred by Failed Repair Skill Checks.
Audio Cue [ edit ] Missing a Repair Skill Check while using Technician triggers the following sound effect: <span class="mw-headline"

name: Tenacity
official_description: "There is nothing stopping you." Your ferocious tenacity in dire situations allows you to benefit from the following effects while in the Dying State: Grants the ability to recover while crawling. | Grants a 30 / 40 / 50 % Haste Status Effect. | Reduces the volume of Grunts of Pain by -75 %. | Blocks your Aura from being read. | "What the hell is this? I'm taking this bastard down!" — Detective David Tapp

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Buff: Added a new effect that reduces the volume of Grunts of Pain.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Buff: Added another new effect that blocks your Aura from being read while in the Dying State.
Nerf: Halved the strength of the Haste Status Effect (previously just a Crawling-Speed bonus) from 30 / 40 / 50 % to 15 / 20 / 25 %.
Nerf: Removed the ability to crawl and recover at the same time.
Change: Updated the Perk with the Haste Status Effect.
Patch 9.3.0 [ edit ] Reversal: Restored the ability to crawl and recover at the same time.
Reversal: Restored the strength of the Haste Status Effect from 15 / 20 / 25 % to 30 / 40 / 50 %.

name: This Is Not Happening
official_description: "You perform at your best when you are under extreme stress." Whenever you are in the Injured State, This Is Not Happening activates and you benefit from the following effect: Increases the Success zone for a Great Skill Check by 10 / 20 / 30 % for the following interactions: Healing | Repairing | |
description_ar: بيرك This Is Not Happening يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.7.0 [ edit ] Rework: now applies its effect to the Success zone for a Great Skill Check, rather than a Good Skill Check.
Patch 3.6.0 [ edit ] Change: no longer applies to Sabotage Skill Checks. This change occurred due to that interaction no longer trigger Skill Checks as of the same Patch.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Troubleshooter
official_description: "No amount of distraction will shake you from your primary task." When you are chased by the Killer, Troubleshooter activates: The Aura of the Generator with the most progress is revealed to you. | The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 4 / 5 / 6 seconds after dropping a Pallet. | These effects linger for 6 / 8 / 10 seconds after ending the Chase, after which Troubleshooter deactivates. "Nothing gets done around here if I don't do it." — Gabriel Soma

name: Unbreakable
official_description: "Past battles have taught you a thing or two about survival." Whenever you are put in the Dying State by the Killer, Unbreakable activates: Increases your Recovery speed by 25 / 30 / 35 %. | Unlocks the Self-Recovery ability, allowing you to fully recover from the Dying State. This ability can only be used once per Trial. | | "Goddammit, I am seriously FUBAR!" — Bill Overbeck

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.8.1 [ edit ] Quality of Life: now wakes up sleeping Survivors on full recovery from Dying State
Patch 3.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the percentages to 25 / 30 / 35 %.
Patch 3.1.0 [ edit ] Nerf (undocumented): with the Freddy Rework, Unbreakable no longer wakes sleeping Survivors from the Dream World.
Patch 9.5.0 [ edit ] Change: now only activates when put in the Dying State by the Killer.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Up the Ante
official_description: "All will be well in the end; you just know it. Your confidence strengthens the feeling of hope for those around you." Unlocks the ability to attempt Self-Unhooks during the first Hook Stage for all Survivors. For every Survivor still in the Trial, Up the Ante is granted +1 Token: Increases the Luck at succeeding Self-Unhook attempts for all Survivors by a stack-able 1 / 2 / 3 % per Token, up to a maximum of 3 / 6 / 9 %. | "What can I say? I'm just a very lucky guy... I'm sure some of it will rub off on you." — Ace Visconti

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 9.0.0 [ edit ] Indirect Buff: now grants the ability to attempt Self-Unhooks that have a chance to succeed during the first Hook Stage. This indirect change occurred due to changes to Luck and the Self-Unhook mechanic in the same Patch.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Urban Evasion
official_description: "Years of evading the cops taught you a thing or two about stealth." You benefit from the following permanent effect: Increases your Movement speed while crouched by 90 / 95 / 100 %. | "The paint is still fresh but I am long gone." — Nea Karlsson
description_ar: بيرك Urban Evasion يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Nea Karlsson. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك Urban Evasion يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Nea Karlsson. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
