راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Crouch Speed bonus from 10 / 12 / 15 % to 40 / 45 / 50 %.
Patch 1.7.0 [ edit ] Buff: further increased the Crouch Speed bonus from 40 / 45 / 50 % to 90 / 95 / 100 %.
Quality of Life: removed the restriction that Urban Evasion is only active when healthy.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Vigil
official_description: "You watch over your friends, even in dire situations." You recover 43 / 55 / 66 % faster from the following: The Blindness, Broken, Exhausted, Exposed, Haemorrhage, Hindered, Mangled, and Oblivious Status Effects. | Vigil extends its effect to all Survivors within 16 metres of your location and lingers for 15 seconds after leaving its Area of Effect. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Vigil at a time. "I am gonna be here when you wake up. You are gonna make it." — Quentin Smith
description_ar: بيرك Vigil يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Quentin Smith. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: added a Linger effect so Survivors leaving its range can still temporarily benefit from Vigil's effect.
Patch 4.5.0 [ edit ] Change: no longer affects Mangled, as the Status Effect was changed from being timer-based to lasting until fully healed.
Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the Recovery Rate bonuses from 10 / 15 / 20 % to 20 / 25 / 30 %.
Buff: now also affects the following new Status Effects: Broken, Exposed, Oblivious.
Patch 7.6.0 [ edit ] Change: once again affects the Mangled Status Effect, as it itself was reverted back to being timer-based.
Patch 8.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: doubled the Perk's range to affect other Survivors from 8 metres to 16 metres.

Buff: further increased the Recovery Rate bonuses from 20 / 25 / 30 % to 43 / 55 / 66 %. It should be noted that this Patch adjusted the in-game description to refer to a time-reduction with adjusted (but equivalent) values of 30 / 35 / 40 % for the Tiers. Previously, the in-game description would match the coded values by referring to a Recovery-rate-increase instead.
Patch 9.2.0 [ edit ] Nerf: no longer stacks with other instances of itself.

name: Visionary
official_description: "You are remarkably focused on your means of escape." You benefit from the following permanent effect: The Auras of Generators are revealed to you within 32 metres. | Visionary is temporarily deactivated for 20 / 18 / 16 seconds whenever a Generator is completed.
description_ar: بيرك Visionary يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Felix Richter. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

name: Wake Up!
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability. Once all Generators are completed, Wake Up! activates: The Auras of the Exit Gate Switches are revealed to you permanently while within 128 metres. | Your Aura is revealed to all other Survivors within 128 metres while you are opening an Exit Gate. | Increases your Gate-Opening speed by a stack-able 8 / 10 / 12.5 % for each Survivor still alive in the Trial, including yourself, up to a maximum of 32 / 40 / 50 %. | "Ok, look. If we survive the next 24 hours, then I'll take you out on a real date." — Quentin Smith
description_ar: بيرك Wake Up! يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Quentin Smith. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased and modified the Aura-reading ranges from a variable 24 / 48 / unlimited metres to a fixed 128 metres across all Tiers.
Patch 5.5.0 [ edit ] Buff: increased the bonus to Opening speeds from 5 / 10 / 15 % to 15 / 20 / 25 %.
Patch 8.5.0 [ edit ] Change: now increases Opening speeds for each alive survivor. Nerf: reduced the opening speeds from 15 / 20 / 25 % to 8 / 10 / 12.5 %
Buff: grants a 8 / 10 / 12.5 % bonus for each alive survivor, up to a maximum of 32 / 40 / 50 %
The developers have explained that this change was made to better fit the intention of the perk being used more altruistically rather than selfishly. (see Gallery )
<span class="mw-headline"

name: We'll Make It
official_description: "Helping others heightens your morale." After unhooking another Survivor, We'll Make It activates for 30 / 60 / 90 seconds: Increases your Altruistic Healing speed by +100 %. | "I am confident we can all escape in one piece if we help each other."
description_ar: بيرك We'll Make It يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك We'll Make It يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.0.2 [ edit ] Nerf: now only affects the Altruistic Healing speed.
Nerf: reduced the duration from 60 / 90 / 120 seconds to 30 / 60 / 90 seconds.
Nerf: changed the variable maximum Healing speed from 100 / 200 / 300 % to a fixed 100 % across all Tiers.

Patch 1.9.3 [ edit ] Quality of Life: added a Perk Effect notification for the rescued Survivor. This is to inform the unhooked Survivor that their Rescuer has We'll Make It and it might be a good idea to let them heal you immediately.
Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: changed the variable Healing Speed bonus from unhooking Survivors from 25 / 50 / 100 % to a fixed 100 % across all Tiers.
Quality of Life: added a line about cumulative Healing speeds being unable to exceed +100 % (read as We'll Make It no longer stacking with itself when unhooking multiple Survivors).

Patch 4.0.2 [ edit ] Change: removed the line previously added about cumulative Healing speeds being unable to exceed +100 %. The intention of this line had been to explain that with its buff in Patch 2.6.0, We'll Make It would no longer stack with itself when unhooking multiple Survivors.
However, the way it was phrased in-game had had the opposite effect and caused considerably more confusion than clarification, prompting the Developers to remove it in this Patch.

name: We're Gonna Live Forever
official_description: Your few friends deserve the best protection. You benefit from the following effect when healing a dying Survivor: Increases your Healing speed by +100 %. | Any dying Survivor you heal back to the Injured State benefits from the following effect: Grants the Endurance Status Effect for 6 / 8 / 10 seconds. This effect can only be triggered once every 30 seconds. | | "Come on then, let's ave' it! I don't give a shit pal." — David King
description_ar: بيرك We're Gonna Live Forever يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية David King. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.
summary: بيرك We're Gonna Live Forever يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية David King. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.7.0 [ edit ] Nerf: halved the stack-able Multiplier per Token from +50 % to +25 %.
Nerf: halved the maximum achievable Multiplier from 100 / 150 / 200 % to 50 / 75 / 100 %.
Patch 2.7.0 [ edit ] Nerf: now requires a Safe Unhook to receive a Token. This change was motivated by the Developers wishing to prevent farming other Survivors through risky unhooks.
Patch 4.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: added a secondary effect that doubles one's Healing speed on dying Survivors.
Quality of Life: added additional ways of receiving Tokens.

Patch 6.1.0 [ edit ] Rework: no longer grants Bonus Bloodpoints after the Trial concludes. This change was motivated by a general rework to the Progression System of Dead by Daylight and reducing the overall grind by approximately ~75 %.
Rework: Consumed Tokens now grant a Survivor that the Perk User healed back to the Injured State the Endurance Status Effect.
Patch 7.1.0 [ edit ] Quality of Life: adjusted the in-game description to indicate that blinding the Killer by any means applies.

name: Wicked
official_description: "They can try to hurt you. But you're not going down so easily." After you are unhooked by any means, Wicked triggers the following effect: The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 16 / 18 / 20 seconds. | While hooked inside the Basement, Wicked potentially triggers the following effect: First Hook Stage: 100 % to succeed an attempted Self-Unhook. | Second Hook Stage: Does not trigger the effect. | Last Survivor Standing: Does not trigger the effect. | "I haven't let anyone get in my way before. You think I'm gonna start now?" — Sable
description_ar: بيرك Wicked يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Sable Ward. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 7.6.0 [ edit ] Rework: Completely redesigned the Perk from its PTB version to live ( see Trivia section below ).

Patch 9.3.0 [ edit ] Note that while this version was technically live, it was not available to Players as the Perk was kill-switched until the Hotfix restoring it to its previous version. Rework: Now suppresses the Loud Noise Notification when unhooked from any Hook and also grants partial Healing progress if unhooked from a Basement Hook while retaining the secondary effect. Nerf: Removed the effect of revealing the Killer's Aura.
Patch 9.3.2 [ edit ] Reversal: Reverted the Perk to its previous version.
<span class="mw-headline"

name: Will to Live
official_description: Using whatever is at hand, you stab your aggressor in an ultimate attempt to escape. After being unhooked or unhooking yourself, Will to Live activates for the next 40 / 50 / 60 seconds: When grabbed or picked up by the Killer, succeed a Skill Check to stab the Killer and escape from their grasp. Stuns the Killer for 4 seconds. | | Causes you to become the next Obsession. | Will to Live is deactivated once the Exit Gates are powered. Will to Live is disabled for the remainder of the Trial after use. Will to Live is deactivated prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action. Increases your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by increasing the default value by +100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
description_ar: بيرك Will to Live يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح.  أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

usage_examples: استخدمه ضمن بيلد يدعم هدفك الأساسي في المباراة.
راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 1.3.0 [ edit ] Nerf: reduced the Stun timers from 3 / 4 / 5 seconds to 3 / 3.5 / 4 seconds.

Patch 1.4.0 [ edit ] Rework: is now an Obsession Perk and remains unchanged in functionality for the Obsession. Nerf: added an Activation condition for all Survivors other than Obsession, making it no longer instantly usable for them.
Patch 2.6.0 [ edit ] Buff: no longer requires non-obsession Survivors to make any wiggle progress.

Quality of Life: moved the Skill Check prompt to the beginning of the pick-up animation, rather than shortly afterwards. This causes a successful Skill Check to stun the Killer right after finishing the pick-up animation.
This change was implemented in an attempt to mitigate the time-waste that comes for the Killer with a successful stun.
Nerf: is now only available after having been unhooked within the last 40 / 50 / 60 seconds.
Nerf: modified and reduced the Stun timer from a variable 3 / 3.5 / 4 seconds to a fixed 3 seconds across all Tiers.
Change: now causes the user to become the Obsession upon use.

name: Windows of Opportunity
official_description: Unlocks potential in your Aura-reading ability. The Auras of Breakable Walls, Pallets, and Windows are revealed to you within 24 / 28 / 32 metres. "Rise and shine, work hard, carve out your name, Take aim, pull the trigger, hit the bulls eye for fame, Know the value of faith, an' family, and don't you complain, Open wide, your windows of opportunity" — Kate Denson's "Windows of Opportunity"
description_ar: بيرك Windows of Opportunity يعطي السيرفايفر أداة لعب مرتبطة بتأثيره الأساسي. اقرأ الوصف الرسمي والقيم الرقمية قبل إدخاله في البيلد، ثم جرّبه مع بيركات تكمل نفس الهدف: معلومات، مطاردة، إبطاء، إنقاذ، أو إصلاح. يرتبط هذا البيرك بشخصية Kate Denson. أفضل استخدام له يكون عندما تبني أسلوب لعبك حول الشرط المذكور في الوصف بدل اعتباره تأثيرًا عشوائيًا.

راقب شرط تفعيل البيرك ولا تهدره في لحظة لا تعطي قيمة.
patch_history: Change Log [ edit ] Patch 3.0.0 [ edit ] Buff: halved the Cool-down durations from 60 / 50 / 40 seconds to 30 / 25 / 20 seconds.
Patch 5.3.0 [ edit ] Buff: removed the Cool-down altogether.
Buff: changed and increased the Aura-reading effect from a fixed 20 metres across all Tiers to a variable 24 / 28 / 32 metres.
Trivia [ edit ] Windows of Opportunity still shows an Aura for Illusionary Pallets and Dream Pallets.
Windows of Opportunity still shows an Aura for Pallets and Windows blocked by The Entity.

While Patch 7.2.0 modified the in-game description to feature the Cool-down again that was removed in Patch 5.3.0, this was merely a visual change and did not affect the Perk's effect. The Developers confirmed this to be a bug.
<span class="mw-headline"
